title: Recruiting Specialists
description:
Qualifications

2+ years of Staffing/Recruitment experience, strong understanding and ability to recruit in all levels of the organization

Excellent inter-personal skills, communication skills and team-based project experience

Clear understanding of the end-to-end recruitment life-cycle processes

Must have experience on mapping and sourcing resumes from all sources

Proficient computer skills including Microsoft Office applications and in-depth knowledge of data mining, boolean queries, internet research, and resume scraping

Strong attention to detail and willingness to learn

Strong command of verbal and written English



Responsibilities

As a Virtual Recruitment Specialist, you will be responsible for sourcing and screening applicants for a US based Home Health Agency, interviewing for hourly and salaried positions, and assisting in job fairs and other outreach events.



The ideal candidate will have considerable skills in interviewing techniques, a good knowledge of all clerical and specialized functions related to Human Resources and will have a good command of the English language. The candidate will effectively communicate with others in a friendly but professional manner.



Additional Responsibilities

Partner with Organization Leaders to forecast and develop plans for key staffing initiatives

Create and implement Employment Marketing Strategies to attract passive job seekers

Work with hiring managers and interview teams to ensure job requirements and expectations are clearly understood and candidates are assessed against appropriate criteria (Calibration)

Develop strong relationships and partner with hiring managers, business leaders and HR

Track and report key metrics designed to measure and predict staffing activity

Regular follow up with the respective hiring managers and candidates to ensure timeliness of recruitment process

Develop and implement search strategy that includes use of organizational approved tools and resources

title: Customer Service / Sales Rep for Phoenix, AZ - Residential Cleaning Company
description:
Greater Phoenix Cleaning — Sales Rep (Phoenix, AZ



We're not your average cleaning company. We're building a $50M+ empire — and we need a closer who can keep up!



___________________



**The Role**



You'll be the voice of Greater Phoenix Cleaning — the first person our customers talk to and the reason they book. This is a high-energy, phone-based sales role where speed wins.



- Respond to inbound leads in under 30 seconds (yes, seconds)

- Quote jobs, negotiate pricing, and close deals — all over the phone

- Collect payment info and lock in residential & commercial cleaning jobs

- Turn one-time customers into recurring clients

- Master our sales process and pricing models inside and out



**Outbound Hustle**



You're not just waiting for the phone to ring. You'll also be hunting for new business:



- Proactive outreach to real estate agents, contractors, and property managers

- Calling, texting,
ing, and hitting up social media platforms

- Creatively using job posting sites to find more work for our crews

- Following up with warm leads until they convert (or tap out)



__________________



**The Schedule**



- **Days On:** Saturday, Sunday, Monday — 8:00 AM to 9:00 PM

- **Days Off:** Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday — all yours

- 3 days on, 4 days off. That's not a typo.

- Weekends are our busiest time — if you can't work them, this isn't the role for you



_______________



**What's In It For You**



- Commission bonuses for hitting and exceeding targets

- A real growth path — managerial roles, performance-based pay increases, and leadership opportunities

- GPC is expanding to Miami, FL and scaling toward a massive national vision

- You're not joining a small gig — you're getting in early on something big



________



**How to Apply**



Record a **2–3 minute Loom video** addressed to **Ross** covering:



1. What got you interested in this role

2. Why you'd be a great fit for Greater Phoenix Cleaning

3. How you'll help us move toward the vision faster



Send it our way. That's the application.



**If you skip the Loom video, you're automatically disqualified. No exceptions.**

ntum

title: Campaign Strategist
description:
Remote | Full-time | Competitive base + performance bonus

We build and run cold outbound systems for B2B companies. Full chain: strategy, messaging, infrastructure, lead sourcing, execution, reply handling. We're scaling fast and need someone to own the client strategy layer and make sure everything moves. This isn't just a job. If you're the right person, this is a growth partner opportunity inside a company that's adding clients every single day.

The role



You're the client's main point of contact. You take their calls, understand their business, make the campaign decisions, and make sure the messaging is sharp before it goes live. Once campaigns are running, you monitor performance and make sure nothing stalls. You direct the teams underneath you, not by doing their work, but by making sure they follow through on theirs. If something is stuck, you unstick it. If a campaign is underperforming, you flag it and adjust.

What you do



Take onboarding and strategy calls with clients. Understand their ICP, how they sell, what makes them different, and how they want to sound. Configure campaigns by choosing the right approach for each client. Review and QA all messaging before it goes out. Get client sign-off on their campaigns. Hand off clean specs to the execution team. Monitor live campaigns and flag what needs attention. Direct the infrastructure, implementation, and VA teams to make sure deliverables are completed on time. Chase anything that's idle. Be the person who makes sure every client is moving through the pipeline and nothing falls through the cracks.



What you don't do

Set up domains,
 accounts, LinkedIn accounts, or any infrastructure yourself. Build anything in any tool yourself. Write code. Handle lead sourcing or data. The teams and systems do all of that. You make sure it gets done.

Who you are



Young, hungry, and experienced. You've already done this, you've run cold outbound at an agency, as a freelancer, or in-house, and you're looking for something bigger. You know what good cold messaging looks like and what gets ignored. You can sit on a call with a business owner and walk away understanding exactly what they need. You have opinions about outbound. You're fast, direct, and you don't let things sit. You're the person who checks the dashboard, sees something at zero, and chases the right person until it's not at zero anymore.



Experience with Clay, n8n, or working at an outbound agency is a strong plus. US/UK based preferred.

Bonus if you play strategy games. Civ, HOI4, EU4, map games, anything where you're thinking about resource allocation, positioning, and long-term moves. This role is the same thing. Pure strategy, no grunt work. If you enjoy those games, you'll enjoy this.



We're not hiring someone who wants to clock in and clock out. We're looking for someone who sees where this is going and wants to grow with it. The right person in this role will be running a significant part of this operation within months.

What you get



You own the strategy and client relationship layer of a rapidly scaling outbound operation. No more setting up inboxes, warming domains, building Clay tables, or doing implementation grunt work. Strategy, messaging, monitoring, and making sure the machine keeps moving. Competitive base plus performance comp tied to client throughput. Remote. Flexible. Results-driven. And if you're the right person, a real seat at the table as we scale.



How to apply

Send your CV and a Loom under 3 minutes. Subject line: "Campaign Strategist, [Your Name]"

In the Loom, walk me through the last cold outbound campaign you ran. Who was the target, what messaging did you use, what happened.

title: Medical Billing Auditor (Denied Claims & Revenue Recovery)
description:
We are looking for an experienced medical billing auditor / AR specialist who can identify missed revenue, undercoding, and denied claims issues. Ideally with experience in procedural/surgical specialties (orthopedics/cardiology/neurosurgery/anesthesiology/etc) and dentistry.



This is NOT a basic claim submission role. We are specifically looking for someone who can analyze claims and explain why revenue was lost and how to recover it.



Responsibilities:

Review medical claims and identify missed CPT codes, modifiers, or documentation gaps

Analyze denied or underpaid claims and determine root cause

Recommend corrections or resubmission strategies

Provide clear explanations of findings

Preferred Experience:

Strong experience with denial management / AR follow-ups

Knowledge of CPT coding, modifiers (25, 59, etc.), and bundling rules

Experience with US healthcare billing (Medicare, commercial payers)

Familiarity with systems like Epic, eClinicalWorks, or payer portals

Important:



We are NOT looking for someone who only submits claims.

We are looking for someone who can think critically and find missed money in claims.



If you have experience identifying underpayments or improving reimbursement, we would love to speak with you.

title: Agency Internal Operating Software — Build Brief
description:
=Overview 

We're a growing marketing agency operating across WhatsApp, Google Sheets, and ClickUp. We need a developer to build an internal web app that puts everything in one place — client performance, payments, sales activity, and team tasks.



The App Has 5 Modules

CEO Dashboard — Business snapshot on login. Client health overview (color coded), revenue projections, sales activity, and auto-generated alerts

Client Hub — Full client profiles with revenue, payment history, performance metrics, weekly updates, and communication logs

Sales Tracker — Daily outreach log, Kanban lead pipeline with follow-up sequence tracking, and sales analytics

Finance & Payments — Payment tracker per client, expense log, contractor payments, monthly revenue projections

Team & Tasks — Daily standup log, task board by client, weekly reports



Tech Requirements

Web-based, mobile responsive

/password login with role-based access (3 roles)

title: Exciting Sales and Customer Service Role w/ Commission in Fast-Paced Residential Cleaning Company in Phoenix, AZ
description:
Greater Phoenix Cleaning — Sales Rep (Phoenix, AZ)



We're not your average cleaning company. We're a fun, not-so-corporate, fast-growing entrepreneurial machine on a mission to build a $50M empire in Phoenix — and then rinse and repeat in Miami, FL! If you're obsessed with personal development, love solving problems, and want to be part of an abundant, high-energy team that actually cares about adding massive value to society, keep reading.



We're looking for happy, hungry, humble, and smart closers who take initiative, crush massive action, and are ready to grow with us. This isn't just a sales job — it's your launchpad to leadership in a company that's scaling big.



The Role

You'll be the high-energy voice and closer for Greater Phoenix Cleaning — the first (and most important) person our customers talk to. This is a fast-paced, phone-based sales role where speed, hustle, and personality win.



Respond to inbound leads in under 30 seconds (yes, seconds — we move quick)

Quote jobs, negotiate like a pro, and close residential & commercial cleaning deals over the phone

Collect payment info and lock in bookings with confidence

Turn one-time clients into loyal recurring customers

Master our proven sales process, pricing models, and scripts inside and out



Outbound Hustle

We don't just sit and wait for the phone to ring. You'll proactively hunt for new business like a true entrepreneur:



Outreach to real estate agents, contractors, property managers, and other partners

Smart calling, texting,
ing, and leveraging social media

Creatively using job boards and other platforms to fill our crews' schedules

Relentless (but smart) follow-up on warm leads until they book or bow out



The Schedule



Days On: Saturday, Sunday, Monday — 8:00 AM to 9:00 PM

Days Off: Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday — fully yours to recharge, pursue side hustles, or enjoy life

3 days on, 4 days off. Weekends are our peak — if you can't own them with energy, this isn't the role for you.



What's In It For You



Uncapped commission bonuses — the more you close and exceed targets, the more you earn

Real growth opportunities: performance-based pay bumps, managerial roles, and leadership tracks as we scale

Early entry into something massive — we're expanding to Miami and building toward a national vision

A culture that rewards leaders who continuously improve, take ownership, and want an abundant life surrounded by an amazing team



If you're a Top Gun A-Player who loves to grow, solve problems, and win as part of a tight-knit, fun team — this is your chance to build something big with us at Greater Phoenix Cleaning.



How to Apply

Record a 2–3 minute Loom video addressed to Ross and cover these three things:



What got you genuinely interested in this role and our company

Why you'd be an outstanding culture fit for Greater Phoenix Cleaning

How you'll help us accelerate toward our $50M+ vision faster



Send it over. That's your entire application.

If you skip the Loom video, you're automatically disqualified. No exceptions.

title: Media Buyer (Facebook Ads) — E-commerce/Dropshipping
description:
Media Buyer 
 Ads) — E-commerce/Dropshipping



Remote • Part-time to Full-time Path



About Us

We’re a fast-growing e-commerce group operating multiple dropshipping brands. We combine rapid testing, sharp creative, and rigorous analytics to launch products that delight customers. You’ll join a lean, ambitious team where your work directly impacts revenue—and where high performers grow quickly.



The Role



As a Media Buyer, you’ll own the end-to-end execution of
 (Meta) acquisition campaigns across several storefronts. You’ll launch and scale daily tests, safeguard account health, and collaborate closely with our CEO, creative, and operations teams to hit revenue and efficiency targets.



What You’ll Do

- Plan, build, and launch campaigns in
 Ads Manager daily (audiences, budgets, placements, tracking).

- Manage and pace budgets against KPIs; reallocate spend toward winners in real time.

- QA all assets and flows pre-launch (ad copy/creatives, URLs, pixels, events, landing pages, checkout).

- Moderate ad comments (hide/delete/reply as appropriate) to protect brand and conversion.

- Monitor account health, policy compliance, and limits; escalate risks early.

- Maintain clear performance reporting in Google Sheets; summarize insights and next steps.

- Partner with the CEO, video editor, and EA; attend a weekly stand-up with concise updates.

- Proactively propose tests (creatives, angles, audiences, funnels) and process improvements.

- Stable account health and policy compliance.



What You Bring

- Minimum IQ of 120

- Fluent in English (written and spoken)

- 2+ years hands-on media buying for E-commerce on
/Meta (dropshipping experience is a plus).

- Strong performance marketing mindset: comfortable with hypotheses, rapid testing, and data-driven decisions.

- Advanced Ads Manager skills; working knowledge of Events Manager, pixels/API, ad account, audiences, and attribution.

- High attention to detail; excellent written English; organized and deadline-reliable.

- Ownership mentality—able to work independently, surface risks, and take initiative without micromanagement.

- Comfortable with Google Sheets (lookups, pivots, basic charting) and structured reporting.

- Note on assessments: We value analytical thinking. Short skills/aptitude tasks may be part of our selection process.



How We Work (and What You’ll Get)

- Part-time with flexible hours, results-oriented culture; path to full-time for top performers.

- Compensation: $5/hour to start + performance bonuses.

- Approved expense reimbursement.

- Merit-based raises as your impact grows.

- Access to proven SOP's, fast feedback loops, and direct collaboration with leadership.

- Real growth opportunities: broaden into creative strategy  or team management as we scale.



How to Apply

- Put your favorite animal in the subject line/title—this helps us spot detail-oriented applicants.

Please include:

- Your CV/Resume.

- Links or screenshots of recent e-commerce campaigns you’ve managed (redact sensitive data).

- A short paragraph on why you’re the best fit, including your typical testing framework (budget per test, iteration cadence, success/fail criteria).

- Your availability (hours per week) 

- Your IQ in your account (you can do this for free on onlinejobs)



No AI-generated applications—we read closely and can tell.



We’re excited to meet driven marketers who want to grow with us and take real ownership. If that sounds like you, let’s talk.

title: Supply Chain Operator E-commerce
description:
We are looking for a high-performance Supply Chain Operator who takes full ownership of inventory flow and replenishment.

We are not looking for someone who follows processes.

We are looking for someone who ensures products stay in stock and operations run smoothly.

You will be responsible for managing inventory across our main warehouse, FBA and LVB.

 

Your responsibility

• You own inventory availability across all channels 

• You ensure products are in stock at the right place at the right time 

• You act before stock-outs happen 

• You manage supply chain as a performance system, not as tasks 

 

What you will do

Daily operations

• Monitor stock levels across warehouse, FBA and LVB 

• Track incoming shipments and delays 

• Maintain clear visibility of inventory at all times 

Replenishment & planning

• Plan and execute replenishment to FBA and LVB 

• Prioritize fast restocking of bestsellers 

• Balance stock between channels 

FBA shipments

• Create and manage FBA shipments (box & pallet level) 

• Book and manage Amazon Freight shipments 

• Ensure smooth inbound flow 

Coordination

• Work with warehouse and carriers 

• Ensure shipments are executed correctly 

• Fix issues fast when something goes wrong 

Inventory control

• Maintain accurate tracking in Airtable / sheets 

• Allocate stock across shipments and containers 

• Keep inbound and stock data clean and reliable 

 

Scope of the role

This role focuses on execution and control of inventory flow within Europe (FBA, LVB, warehouse).

It does not include:

• Supplier communication in China 

• Procurement / purchasing 

• Long-term demand forecasting 

These are handled in a separate role.

 

What we expect

• You are proactive and fast 

• You think in stock and flow, not tasks 

• You take ownership of problems 

• You don’t wait — you act 

 

Weekly output

• Which SKUs are at risk of going out of stock 

• What shipments are delayed or at risk 

• What actions are taken to fix this 

• Clear plan for next week 

 

Important

If a product goes out of stock, you take ownership.

title: Senior Demand & Inventory Planner
description:
We are looking for a high-performance operator to own forecasting, inventory planning and cash efficiency as we scale towards €100M+.



This is not a reporting role.

This is not a support role.

You will take ownership of our forecasting and inventory planning system and ensure it actually drives decisions.

 

Your responsibility

• You own demand forecasting across all channels (Amazon, Bol, etc.) 

• You d
 how much we buy, when we buy and where we allocate stock 

• You ensure we never run out of stock on winning products 

• You prevent overstock and dead inventory 

• You optimize working capital as we scale 

You are responsible for turning data into clear decisions.

 

What you will do

Forecasting (core)

• Maintain and improve SKU-level forecasts 

• Use historical data, trends and growth signals 

• Adjust forecasts based on real performance 



Inventory & purchasing decisions

• Translate forecasts into purchase plans 

• D
 order quantities and timing 

• Balance risk between stock-outs and overstock 

Cash & scaling

• Manage inventory vs cash position 

• Support scaling decisions with data 

• Keep inventory healthy while growing 



System & structure

• Work within our existing Airtable-based system 

• Improve structure, logic and reliability 

• Ensure the system is used for decision-making 



Supplier alignment

• Align planning with supplier lead times 

• Anticipate delays and adjust proactively 

 

What we expect

• 3–7+ years experience in forecasting / inventory planning 

• Strong analytical mindset 

• Experience in e-commerce or Amazon is a big plus 

• Able to work with data and translate it into decisions 

• Structured and detail-oriented 

• Ownership mindset 



You don’t just build models.

You use them to make decisions.

 

This is NOT for you if:

• You only build dashboards 

• You wait for instructions 

• You avoid making decisions 

• You need perfect data before acting 

 

Weekly output

• Forecast vs actual 

• Stock coverage per SKU 

• Risk overview (stock-outs / overstock) 

• Purchase plan and cash impact 

• Clear actions 

 

What makes this role different

• Direct impact on revenue and cash 

• Work on a system that is already in place and improve it 

• Focus on decisions, not just data 

• Key role in scaling the business 

 

Important

If we run out of stock or overstock heavily, you take ownership.

 

Application

To apply, send a short video (1–2 minutes) explaining:

1. How you approach forecasting in a growing business 

2. A situation where your planning improved results

title: Wedding Video Editor – Premiere Pro
description:
Looking for a Wedding Editor Who Actually Gets It

Hey — I'm Justin, co-owner of ToneMedia, a wedding videography company based in New Jersey, USA. We've been shooting weddings for 12 years across some of the top venues in the NY/NJ area.

I'm not looking for someone who "knows Premiere Pro." I'm looking for someone who watches back a first dance and knows exactly where to cut. Someone who hears the toast building and already feels where the music should breathe. If you've edited weddings before, you know what I mean.

Here's what this is:

We need a Premiere Pro editor for wedding highlight reels, ceremony edits, and reception content. This starts as project-based with real potential to become ongoing and consistent work as our season ramps up.



What I need from you to apply:



2-3 wedding edits you're proud of (links, not screenshots)

Your rate — per project, per finished minute, or hourly. Be honest. I respect transparency and I pay fairly.

Your current availability and typical turnaround

Confirmation you can complete a paid test edit within 2-3 days of receiving footage



What you'll get from us:



-Organized footage, clear creative direction, and a reference cut so you're never guessing

-Respectful communication and timely payment. Always.

-A real working relationship, not a one-off gig where you never hear from us again



Please don't apply if:



You edit on DaVinci, Final Cut, or anything other than Premiere Pro

You've never edited a full wedding before

You can't turn around the test edit in 2-3 days



If you've read this far and you're thinking "this sounds like someone I'd actually want to work with"  that's the point. Send me a message with your samples, rate, and availability.



Talk soon.

— Justin "tone"

title: Voice Production Specialist — YouTube AI Voiceover
description:
Position Overview



We produce educational YouTube videos (10–11 minutes each) for a relationship psychology channel. All voiceover is generated using ElevenLabs AI with a custom voice. We need someone to take our finished scripts and produce broadcast-ready audio files for every video — from generation through final cleanup — delivered directly to our Google Drive.



What you'll receive per video: A clean script with ElevenLabs audio tags already embedded, workspace access to our custom voice and settings, and a Drive folder ready to receive files.



What you'll deliver per video: 1 individual audio section files, generated and named per our convention, normalized to -14 LUFS, light compression applied, exported as MP3 44.1kHz 128kbps and uploaded to the correct Drive subfolder.



ElevenLabs specs: eleven_v3 model · Stability 0.50 · Similarity 0.80 · Speaker Boost off · Audio tags pre-written in the script.



Audio post specs: -14 LUFS per section · High-pass filter · De-essing if needed · Flat or off-tone sections regenerated before delivery.



Backlog: ~28 existing videos need post-processing cleanup only (no regeneration). This is your first priority on hire.

Ongoing volume: 4-6/week to start, scaling within 3 months



Payment:



Backlog rate is $4–6/video. Once work effectiveness is proven by the completion of the backlog, we can negotiate a higher salary .

title: Customer Service Representative – Workers Comp Drug and Alcohol Testing
description:
CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE – WORKERS’ COMPENSATION 

DRUG & ALCOHOL TESTING (REMOTE – PHILIPPINES) 

*LOCATION: METRO MANILA & CAVITE APPLICANTS ONLY 



=== ABOUT THE ROLE === 

USA Mobile Drug Testing (USAMDT) is hiring a Customer Service Representative (CSR) to support our Workers’ Compensation Drug and Alcohol Testing operations. 



This role works closely with our Workers’ Compensation and Claims teams to process testing requests, coordinate collections, and obtain results as quickly and accurately as possible. Speed, attention to detail, and clear communication are critical. 



This is a specialized CSR position, not a script-based call center role. You will handle live calls, time-sensitive injury-related requests, documentation, and follow-up. 



We operate in a process-driven, accountability-focused environment and are organizing the company around the EOS / Traction framework, emphasizing role clarity, ownership, and disciplined execution. 



This is a long-term role with structured training, scorecards, and defined milestones. 



=== KEY RESPONSIBILITIES === 

PHONE &
 COMMUNICATION 

• Answer inbound calls live and professionally 

• Return voi
s within 30 minutes 

• Respond to
s within 4 hours 

• Interpret unclear or rambling explanations related to injuries or claims 

• Ask clarifying questions to ensure correct testing is ordered 

• Communicate expectations, timelines, and next steps clearly 

• Log all calls and interactions accurately 

• Escalate urgent or high-risk situations immediately 



WORKERS’ COMPENSATION TESTING COORDINATION 

• Process workers’ compensation drug and alcohol testing requests 

• Coordinate with employers, claims teams, collectors, clinics, and labs 

• Schedule collections quickly and accurately 

• Confirm availability before finalizing schedules 

• Prioritize cases based on urgency and client requirements 

• Maintain accurate job and claim status codes 



RESULTS TRACKING & DOCUMENTATION 

• Track collections and follow up on incomplete or missing information 

• Monitor test progress and obtain results as quickly as possible 

• Process paperwork from collectors and clinics 

• Edit and finalize documents using Foxit PDF 

• Upload documents to SharePoint or route results internally 

• Update job logs with donor information, test stages, and claim status 

• Ensure documentation accuracy and compliance 



CUSTOMER & INTERNAL SUPPORT 

• Provide status updates to employers and internal teams 

• Assist with claims-related questions and next-step clarification 

• Maintain professionalism during sensitive or stressful calls 



=== REQUIRED EXPERIENCE AND QUALIFICATIONS === 

• Minimum 3 years supporting a small U.S.-based company 

• At least 3 years of live voice experience with U.S. customers 

• Strong verbal and written English at a professional level 

• Ability to manage time-sensitive requests in a fast-paced environment 

• Experience with Microsoft Office, SharePoint, and CRM tools 

• Comfort following documented workflows and escalation paths 

• High attention to detail and personal accountability 



=== CRITICAL CHARACTERISTICS FOR SUCCESS === 

The ideal candidate consistently demonstrates: 

• Critical thinking to interpret unclear or rambling explanations 

• Intellectual humility — asks questions and seeks clarity 

• Proactive behavior without waiting for direction 

• Strong sense of urgency, especially for injury-related cases 

• Attention to detail and follow-through 

• Effective priority management and time management 

• Punctuality and reliability 

• Integrity — doing what you said you would do, when you said you would do it, and cleaning it up when you don’t 

• Clear, concise communication that directly addresses the issue at hand 



=== ENGLISH COMMUNICATION REQUIREMENT (NON-NEGOTIABLE) === 

This role requires advanced English communication to support U.S.-based employers and internal claims teams. 



You must be able to: 

• Clearly understand American callers in real time 

• Communicate confidently without scripts 

• Handle urgent or sensitive conversations professionally 



--- USA ENGLISH LIVE CONVERSATION ASSESSMENT --- 

• Shortlisted candidates will complete a real-time English conversation assessment

• Scenario-based discussion 

• Accent is not evaluated — clarity, comprehension, and professionalism are 



=== PERSONALITY & WORK-STYLE ASSESSMENT === 

Candidates may be asked to complete a personality or work-style assessment to help evaluate communication style, accountability, and role fit. Results are reviewed alongside interviews and performance indicators and are not used as standalone pass/fail criteria. 



=== POWER, INTERNET & EQUIPMENT REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE) === 

POWER BACKUP 

• Within 90 days, you must have 7–8 hours of reliable backup power 

• Must support a laptop or desktop, second monitor, and modem/router 

• Stand-alone battery solution required (multiple units acceptable) 

• Photos and specifications must be provided 

*** FAILURE TO MEET THIS REQUIREMENT WITHIN 90 DAYS WILL RESULT IN TERMINATION *** 



HEADSET REQUIREMENT 

• Professional noise-cancelling headset suitable for U.S. phone support 

• Clear microphone quality with minimal background noise 

• Approved headset options provided during onboarding 



=== TRAINING, PERFORMANCE & CAREER PROGRESSION === 

INITIAL TRAINING (0–90 DAYS) 

• Workers’ Compensation testing workflows 

• Documentation standards and quality expectations 

• Performance scorecards and accountability metrics 



CSR LEVEL 1 

• Achieved at 90 days with performance score of 4 out of 5 or higher 



CSR LEVEL 2 

• Earned through consistent performance and skill mastery 

• Handles more complex cases with reduced supervision 



This role does not include secondary roles. Focus is on Workers’ Compensation testing accuracy and speed. 



=== COMPENSATION === 

• Compensation range: $4.00 to $7.00 USD per hour 

• $4.00 USD per hour during training 

• Raises at 90 days, 6 months, 9 months, and 12 months (performance-based) 

• Additional incentives tied to KPIs and role proficiency 

 

=== TIME OFF POLICY === 

• First 90 days: No time off 

• Remainder of first year: Up to 5 unpaid days 

• After one year: 5 paid days, usable in 2-hour increments 

Candidates will be asked to disclose any planned time off for the next 12 months during the interview. 



=== IMPORTANT NOTES === 

• Applicants must currently reside in Metro Manila or Cavite 

• This role requires stability, reliability, and long-term commitment
salary: $4 per hour USD starting ($5 to $6 av...

title: Business Systems Specialist (Client Services)
description:
We are seeking a Business Systems Specialist to help build, maintain, and improve the systems that power our day-to-day operations. In this role, you will partner with stakeholders to understand business processes, translate needs into technical solutions, and deliver automation, reporting, and integrations that scale.

 

The ideal candidate is a strong communicator who can comfortably move between business users and technical implementation. While we use specific tools like Salesforce, Boomi, Power Automate, and Power BI, we are looking for someone with a solid foundation in CRM/ERP administration, system integrations, and workflow automation who is eager to learn and master our specific tech stack.

 

Key Responsibilities

• Workflow Automation

      o Design, build, and maintain automated workflows to streamline business processes.

      o Troubleshoot and optimize existing automations for performance, reliability, and clarity.

      o Implement approval workflows, notifications, data syncs, and operational automations.



• Reporting & Analytics

      o Build and maintain business reports and dashboards based on stakeholder requirements.

      o Connect to data sources, shape data, and create clear visualizations for decision-making.

      o Ensure reporting is accurate, well-documented, and easy for end users to interpret.



• System Integrations

      o Configure and support integration processes across internal systems.

      o Assist with monitoring, error handling, and ongoing integration improvements.

      o Document integration logic, data mappings, and dependencies.



• CRM/ERP Administration & Enablement

      o Implement and configure CRM/ERP environments (Dynamics 365, Salesforce, etc.) to align with client-specific workflows).

      o Assist with data imports, validation rules, reports, dashboards, and user support.

      o Partner with teams to improve adoption and ensure the CRM/ERP matches business processes.



• Cross-Functional Support

      o Gather requirements, map current-state and future-state processes, and recommend solutions.

      o Provide clear documentation (process flows, system configs, runbooks).

      o Communicate status, risks, and timelines effectively to both technical and non-technical audiences.

 

Qualifications

Required

• Experience with CRM/ERP Systems Foundation: Experience supporting or administering a CRM/ERP (e.g., Dynamics 365, Salesforce, HubSpot).

• Automation & Integration Experience: Familiarity with building automated workflows and connecting systems (e.g., Power Automate, Zapier, Boomi, MuleSoft, etc.).

• API Knowledge: Basic understanding of APIs (REST preferred), including authentication concepts and data formats (JSON).

• Comfort Working with APIs: Ability to use API documentation to understand how to connect and move data between systems.

• Business Process Knowledge: Strong ability to understand business workflows and translate them into system logic.

• Excellent Communication: Strong written and verbal skills, with a customer-service mindset.

Preferred (Nice to Have)

• Experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, etc.).

• Familiarity with iPaaS concepts (monitoring, error handling, retries, logging).

• Experience working in a ticketing system and documenting changes.

• A proactive, problem-solving mindset with a strong desire to learn new tools and technologies.



Why Join Us?

We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (2004) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



*** The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST with an hour of Lunch break, Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Email Marketing Assistant
description:
Email Marketing Assistant



Date With the Muse



[
](
)



If you can commit to and live with the following principles, then you are the type of person who will be successful and help our company thrive. If you feel this level of engagement is not right for you or that you’re not willing or able to participate with us at this level, we are not a good fit for you.



Our expectation is that you will take the steps necessary to do what you say you are going to do and be accountable for your actions. You are committed to excellence and take pride in a job well done.



We understand that not every person is ready for this level of performance and we appreciate the honesty of those who d
 this is not the right place for them. On the other hand, you would make an ideal candidate to join our company if you are willing to commit to the following principles:



- Accountability: see it, own it, solve it, do it

- Become part of the solution

- Respect for others and their feelings

- Act now.

- Ask the question: “What else can I do?”

- Ask the questions: “What coaching do you have for me?” and “What can I do better?”

- Personal ownership and pride

- Reject average

- Show others that you care



Part-Time | Remote

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented, systems-driven
 Marketing Specialist who is deeply experienced in Mailchimp and can own the execution, tracking, and optimization of our
 campaigns from start to finish.

This is not a beginner role. You must already know how to use Mailchimp at an advanced level and be able to execute without hand-holding.



Role Overview

You will be responsible for building, scheduling, tagging, automating, and tracking
 campaigns inside Mailchimp to support launches, lead nurturing, and ongoing marketing initiatives.

Success in this role means:

Campaigns go out accurately and on time

Audience segmentation is intentional and strategic

Automations run cleanly and reliably

Data is tracked and reported in a way that informs decisions



Core Responsibilities

Campaign Execution

Build and schedule
 campaigns in Mailchimp

Format
s for clarity, readability, and brand consistency

Ensure all links, tags, and tracking are correctly implemented

Conduct final QA before sending (no broken links, formatting errors, or tag issues)

Audience Segmentation & Tagging

Apply and manage tags based on lead source, behavior, and engagement

Maintain clean audience organization (no duplication, no tag chaos)

Segment lists for targeted campaigns (launches, webinars, nurture sequences)

Automations

Build and maintain automated
 sequences (welcome flows, nurture sequences, event follow-ups)

Ensure automations trigger correctly based on tags and user behavior

Troubleshoot and fix any automation issues proactively

Data Tracking & Reporting

Track key metrics: open rates, click-through rates, conversions, unsubscribe rates

Provide clear weekly reports with insights (not just numbers)

Identify what’s working, what’s not, and where to optimize

Systems & Maintenance

Maintain a clean, organized Mailchimp backend

Document processes and ensure repeatable workflows

Flag issues before they become problems



Required Experience

Advanced, hands-on experience with Mailchimp (non-negotiable)

Proven ability to:

Build campaigns from scratch

Set up and manage automations

Use tags and segmentation strategically

Track and interpret campaign performance data

Strong attention to detail (you catch what others miss)

Ability to follow SOPs while also thinking critically when something doesn’t make sense



Ideal Candidate

Systems thinker (you see how all the pieces connect)

Proactive (you don’t wait to be told something is broken)

Organized and methodical

Comfortable working independently and owning outcomes

Able to execute quickly without sacrificing precision



Definition of Done

A task is complete when:

The campaign is sent or automation is live

All tags and segmentation are correctly applied

All links and tracking are verified

Performance is tracked and reported



Commitment & Reliability (Non-Negotiable)

This role requires absolute reliability and follow-through.

Campaigns will often be scheduled days or weeks in advance

You are expected to complete work ahead of deadlines—not at the last minute

You must ensure you have working access to Mailchimp at all times (login issues are not an acceptable blocker)

If something is not scheduled when it should be, that is a failure of the role

If an issue arises, you are expected to flag it early—not when a campaign is about to go out

This is not a “log in when you feel like it” position.

 This is a time-sensitive execution role tied directly to revenue.

## To Apply



Qualified applicants are encouraged to apply as soon as possible. To express interest please submit 



a cover letter addressed to the CEO detailing why you are uniquely qualified for this role,



a resume,



and a DISC profile 



 materials to 
 with the headline



Interviews will be conducted on a rolling basis. This position begins ASAP for the right candidate. 



Applications received through this platform/website will not move forward.

title: AUTHOR BUSINESS ASSISTANT — P.A. Mason (Indie Urban Fantasy Author)
description:
Location: Remote 

Hours: 8 hours per week to start, with potential to grow

Rate: $4–6 USD per hour based on experience

Start date: Flexible — targeting April
ABOUT THE ROLE



I'm Paula Mason (P.A. Mason), an Australian indie author of military urban fantasy fiction. I'm looking for a reliable, self-directed assistant to help run the business side of my author career. This is not a general admin role — it's a specialised position for someone who understands the indie publishing world, reads fantasy or romance, and can work independently without hand-holding.



The role starts at 8 hours per week with real potential to grow, particularly around book launches. Work is fully remote and async — you choose your hours provided priority tasks are completed on time.



---



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



The task mix shifts week to week depending on where I am in my publishing cycle. Core responsibilities include:



• Audiobook production using ElevenLabs — listening through AI-generated chapters against the manuscript, logging errors with timestamps, making fixes, and organising final files in Google Drive. This is one of the most important parts of the role.



• Platform and database maintenance — keeping book listings accurate and SEO-optimised across Shopify, Goodreads, StoryGraph, ISFDB, YouTube, and other platforms.



• Community engagement — participating authentically in 
 and
 reader communities (r/UrbanFantasy, r/suggestmeabook, enemies-to-lovers groups etc.) as a genuine reader, recommending books where relevant.



• Monthly blog post production — managing a monthly Urban Fantasy book recommendations post on my Shopify website, including Canva graphics, AI-assisted content generation, HTML implementation, and SEO metadata.



• ARC and review management — tracking advance reader copies and reviews ahead of new releases (ramping up later in 2026).



• Market research — finding newsletter swap partners, comp authors, reviewers, and promotional opportunities.



---



WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR



Essential:

• Experience supporting indie authors — you understand KDP, Kindle Unlimited, and the self-publishing ecosystem

• A genuine reader, ideally in fantasy or romance — you understand reader communities from the inside

• Strong written English — you'll be representing my author brand in online communities

• Self-directed and detail-oriented — I need someone who takes a brief and runs with it

• Comfortable with Google Workspace, Canva, and Meta Business Suite



Highly desirable:

• Experience with ElevenLabs or similar AI audio tools

• Experience with Shopify

• Familiarity with Goodreads, StoryGraph, or book databases

• Understanding of SEO basics



---



WORK STYLE



We operate in two modes depending on my release schedule:



MODE A (Launch weeks): 80-90% of time on audiobook production, Shopify listings, and ARC tracking. Research tasks paused.



MODE B (Maintenance weeks): Focus on community engagement, database updates, blog production, and market research.



All tasks are tracked in a shared Google Sheet. Weekly end-of-week summary required. Primary communication via WhatsApp for quick questions — if you're stuck for more than 10 minutes, just ask.



---



HOW TO APPLY



IMPORTANT: Applications that do not follow these instructions exactly will not be considered.



1. Subject line must include the word Barney — applications without this word in the subject line will not be opened.



2. Include a short paragraph (5-8 sentences) about your experience supporting authors or working in the book/publishing space. Be specific — tell me what you've actually done, not just what you can do.



3. Attach your CV.



4. Complete this short task (approx. 10 minutes):



Visit these two pages:



— The Elf Captive on Amazon: 



— Amazon Top 100 Urban Fantasy: 



From the Top 100 list, choose 3 books you believe are the strongest comp titles for The Elf Captive based on genre, tropes, and reader audience overlap. For each book provide:

— The Amazon link

— One sentence explaining why it's a strong match



This task has no single correct answer — I'm looking for your judgment and your ability to identify reader crossover. It should take around 10 minutes.



Successful applicants will be invited to complete a paid 2-hour skills test before any further commitment is discussed. The preferred candidate will be offered a four week trial period upon commencement.



I look forward to hearing from you.

title: Virtual Learning & Content Assistant
description:
Position Overview

We are a 30 year injury law firm that is focusing on elevating our training. We are looking for a highly organized Virtual Learning & Content Assistant to support our training programs.



In this role, you’ll be given the content by trainers and team leads. We need someone to take the content and create courses in our LMS and training resources in SharePoint. You will also turn live trainings and internal information into clear, easy-to-use digital resources with the help of AI and other content authoring tools. 



Key Responsibilities

Build & Manage Online Courses in our LMS 

Put content given to you by trainers into an easy to follow course 

Create from the content given to you:

-Quizzes and tests 

-Assignments and activities

-Reading materials and resources

Keep courses up to date as training changes

Make sure courses are easy to follow and well-structured.

Create SharePoint Content

Upload content in our SharePoint platform

Create helpful articles, guides, and resources for employees based on course content 

Turn live trainings into clear written content.

Keep all content consistent in style and format.

Track Training & Reports

Keep attendance records for trainings up to date

Make sure training data (enrollments, completions, etc.) is accurate.

Help organize reports and track files.

Identify and fix missing or incorrect data.

Ensure leadership has reliable, up-to-date training data. 

Support Digital Content Creation

Help turn existing training into digital content.

Use tools (including AI) to create:

-Online course content

-SharePoint resources

-Short learning materials

-Check all content for accuracy and quality.



Required Skills & Qualifications

- Strong organization and time management skills

- Clear writing and attention to detail

- Comfortable working independently (remote role)

- Learning Management Systems (LMS)

- SharePoint or similar tools

- Ability to work with different teams and meet deadlines



Preferred Qualifications

-Experience in training, learning & development, or similar work

-Familiarity with AI or content creation tools

-Experience supporting live or blended training

-Experience in legal, corporate, or professional services (a plus)

-Proficiency in PowerPoint



Why This Role Matters

This role helps us turn training into lasting, easy-to-access resources. You’ll play an important part in making sure employees can learn, grow, and find the information they need—long after training sessions are over.

title: AI Agent Developer
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a developer who lives at the intersection of AI and automation. You'll design and build fully autonomous creative pipelines that take a single prompt and produce complete, polished advertisements — visuals, video, copy, and editing — with no manual intervention and other sorts of Ai agents that helps our beauty brand Faccelove function more efficiently. 



You'll work with Claude Code as the orchestration backbone, integrating third-party generative AI services (NanoBanana for image generation, Higgsfield for AI video, and others) into seamless, production-grade workflows. The end goal: a system where a human provides a brief and gets back a finished creative asset.



What You'll Build

- Autonomous AI agent pipelines using Claude Code that chain together multiple generative AI services end-to-end

- API integrations with image generation (NanoBanana), video generation (Higgsfield), and editing/post-production tools

- Prompt engineering systems that translate high-level creative briefs into structured, multi-step agent workflows

- Quality control and feedback loops — automated checks that evaluate outputs and retry/refine when needed

- Robust error handling, state management, and logging for complex multi-API orchestration





Requirements (Must-Have)

- Hands-on experience building AI agents or agentic workflows (Claude Code, LangChain, CrewAI, or similar frameworks)

- Strong proficiency in Python and/or TypeScript — you write clean, production-grade code, not just scripts

- Experience with LLM APIs: function calling / tool use, structured outputs, prompt chaining, and multi-turn orchestration

- Proven ability to integrate and orchestrate multiple third-party APIs in a single automated pipeline

- Solid understanding of async programming, error handling, retry logic, and building resilient systems



Nice-to-Have

- Familiarity with generative media APIs — image generation, video generation, or AI-driven editing tools

- Experience with creative production workflows (advertising, content creation, or media post-production)

- Background in MCP (Model Context Protocol), tool servers, or building custom tool integrations for LLMs



Tech Stack

- Claude Code, Anthropic API, Python, TypeScript, NanoBanana, Higgsfield, MCP, REST APIs, Webhooks, Git



What Sets You Apart

You don't just use AI tools — you build systems that make AI tools work together autonomously. You've shipped at least one project where an AI agent completes a multi-step task end-to-end without human intervention. You understand that the hardest part isn't the individual API calls — it's the orchestration, the edge cases, and making the whole pipeline reliable at scale.



You're comfortable in ambiguity. This space is new and moving fast. You'll often be the first person to figure out how to make two services talk to each other in a way nobody has documented yet.

title: Technical GHL Systems Engineer (Operations + API Expert)
description: We are looking for a high-level GoHighLevel (GHL) Systems Engineer to act as both the Architect and the Implementer. You will be responsible for a total cleanup of an existing GHL Agency and will act as the lead technical point of contact for our web programming team (HTML/Custom Code).

title: AI Operations Builder
description:
We're a small US-based agency (NVZN) that helps small businesses get their operations in order. We build websites, custom dashboards, and backend automations for our clients. We need a technical builder to work alongside the founder on the build side of projects.



This is NOT a traditional developer role. We "vibe code" - meaning we use AI tools (primarily Claude Code) to build things fast. You describe what you want, the AI writes the code, you test it, iterate, and ship. If you've never used Claude Code or AI-assisted coding, this isn't the right fit.



What you'll be building:



Client websites (Astro, React, Tailwind CSS, deployed on Vercel)

Custom command center dashboards (Next.js, Supabase)

Backend automations using n8n, 
, and Zapier

GoHighLevel workflows (pipelines, triggers, webhooks, SMS sequences)

API integrations between tools (webhooks, REST APIs, OAuth flows)



Must-have skills:



Experience with Claude Code or similar AI coding tools (Cursor, Copilot) — you need to be comfortable building with AI, not writing everything from scratch

n8n workflow building (our primary automation platform)


 scenario building

GoHighLevel (workflows, pipelines, triggers)

Basic web development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript/TypeScript, React) or the ability to build well with claude code

Comfortable with Git, terminal commands, and deploying to Vercel

Can work US Mountain Time hours (at least 4-hour overlap)



Nice to have:



Zapier experience

Supabase / PostgreSQL

Astro framework

API debugging and webhook troubleshooting



How we work:



You'll get detailed specs or plans for what needs to be built

You build it using Claude Code and your own skills

We review together, iterate, and ship

Communication is async (WhatsAPP) with weekly video calls



We move fast and keep things simple



This is a long-term contract role with the opportunity to move into a full-time position in the coming months. We're looking for someone reliable, sharp, and self-directed who wants to grow with a small agency. If you need hand-holding on every task, this isn't it.

title: Kajabi Course Builder & Digital Marketing VA
description:
I'm a high-conflict, relationship, and trauma coach with fully developed course content — videos, written modules, workbooks — and I need someone to build it out inside Kajabi, wire up the funnels, and eventually own the ongoing digital marketing execution. This is a long-term role with growing responsibility.



Phase 1 (Start Here)



Upload and format course content in Kajabi (modules, videos, workbooks, assessments)

Design course pages to match brand standards

Build out full sales funnels — landing pages, checkout,
 sequences, thank-you pages

Set up automations and pipelines



Phase 2 (As You Prove Yourself)



Weekly
 newsletters

Lead magnet creation and delivery sequences

Website updates and maintenance



What I'm Looking For



Demonstrated Kajabi experience — not "familiar with," actually built in it

Eye for design and layout, not just technical setup

Understands funnel logic: opt-in ? lead magnet ? nurture ? offer

Self-directed. I give you the assets and the outcome. You figure out the how.

Strong written English for
 and copy formatting

Experience with Canva or similar for workbook/graphic formatting is a plus



What This Is Not



This is not a task-ticker role. I move fast, and I need someone who can keep up. If you need hand-holding on every step, this isn't the right fit.



To Apply



Send a brief Loom video (2–3 minutes) showing me a Kajabi build you've done — a course page, a funnel, anything live. No video, no consideration. Tell me what platforms you know and your availability.

title: AI Automation Developer
description:
About Us

We're a fast-moving cosmetics brand named Faccelove that uses AI to automate as much of our operations as possible — from creative production to internal workflows to customer-facing systems. We don't just use AI tools; we build custom AI-powered systems that run autonomously. We're looking for a developer who can become our go-to person for building these systems across the business.



What You'll Work On: 

This isn't a single project — it's an ongoing role building AI-powered automation across different areas of the business. Examples of what we need built:

- Autonomous creative pipelines that generate complete ads (visuals, video, copy, editing) from a single brief (Most urgent)

- Internal workflow automation — connecting tools, databases, and AI models to eliminate manual work

- AI agents that handle repetitive business processes end-to-end without human intervention

- Custom integrations between third-party AI services (image generation, video generation, LLMs) and our internal systems

- Data pipelines, dashboards, and reporting tools powered by AI analysis

- Customer-facing AI features — chatbots, personalized content, intelligent recommendations



New projects come up regularly. You'll need to be someone who can take a business problem, figure out the best way to solve it with AI and automation, and build it.



What We're Looking For

Must-have:

- Experience building AI agents or agentic workflows (Claude Code, LangChain, CrewAI, or similar)

- Strong Python and/or TypeScript — production-grade, not just prototypes

- Experience with LLM APIs: tool use, function calling, structured outputs, prompt engineering

- Ability to integrate and orchestrate multiple APIs into automated pipelines

- Full-stack capability — you can build both the backend logic and a functional frontend when needed

- Self-starter mindset — you take a problem, propose a solution, and build it without hand-holding



Nice-to-have:

- Experience with generative media APIs (image gen, video gen, AI editing tools)

- DevOps skills (Docker, CI/CD, cloud deployment)

- Database design and management (PostgreSQL, Supabase, vector databases)

- Experience with MCP (Model Context Protocol) or custom LLM tool integrations

- Background in n8n, Make, or other automation platforms (we prefer custom-built, but it helps to know the landscape)





Tech We Use

Claude Code, Anthropic API, Python, TypeScript, Next.js, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Docker, REST APIs, various generative AI services



What Makes This Role Different

This isn't a one-off gig. We want someone who grows with us and becomes the person who knows our systems inside and out. You'll have real ownership over what you build, input on what we should build next, and the freedom to propose solutions we haven't thought of yet.



To Apply

Tell us:

1. What's the most interesting AI automation you've built? (link or description)

2. What's your availability and preferred working arrangement?

3. Your expected hourly/monthly salary

title: Outbound Calls - Sales Rep B2B SDR BDR
description:
*** Only CV/Resumes With Track Record And Video Will Be Considered ***



We're seeking a Sales Development Representative to join our team.



As a Sales Development Representative, you will be responsible for outreach, prospecting, and lead qualification. Your key role will be to create and implement outbound sales strategies, make effective cold calls, prepare target lists, and nurture them to convert into an appointment with one of our inside sales rep.



The primary focus of this role is qualifying leads, from prospecting through appointment setting.



Key Responsibilities:

- Conduct cold and warm outreach to pre-qualify and schedule introductory meetings for the sales team.

- Identify, research, and qualify new prospects using Seamless.ai, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and outbound outreach (calls and
).

- Build and maintain a targeted prospect list and active sales pipeline.

- Track all prospect interactions, outreach, and follow-ups in HubSpot CRM.

- Collaborate with the CEO to refine lead generation strategies.



Qualifications:

- Minimum of 4 years of sales and cold calling.

- Proficiency in cold calling techniques.

- Fluent in English.

- Flawless communication skills, both written and oral.

- Exceptional ability to craft compelling follow-up
s that drive meeting bookings.

- Demonstrated ability to work solo as well as being a productive tea
mber, making outbound calls every day.

- Proficiency in HubSpot CRM, Seamless.ai, and LinkedIn Sales Navigator.

- Must be an excellent problem-solver and willing to collaborate in an exceedingly competitive environment.

- Work US business hours.



To Apply:

- Provide your cold calling sales track record.

- Provide video introducing yourself answering these 3 questions:

1. What do you see as your 3 strongest attributes?

2. Why are you suited for this position? (provide what has been your best cold call opener)

3. Role play the opening of a cold call to a corporate prospect and show how you would move toward booking an introductory meeting. Their objection is: “I’m busy right now. Just send me an
.” Show how you would respond and continue the conversation!



Compensation:

- Full-time position.

- Competitive rate, ranging from $800 to $1,200 per month (40 hours per week).



*** Only CV/Resumes With Track Record And Video Will Be Considered ***



Company Overview:

We are a full-service marketing firm that serves corporate clients that need additional marketing bandwidth and experienced support. We act as an extension of internal teams, helping companies execute and scale their marketing efforts when time, resources, or specialized expertise are limited. With more than 15 years in the industry, we are proud to be a women and minority-owned business focused on helping companies grow through smart, results-driven marketing.



If you're driven, dedicated to personal growth, and thrive on building relationships with clients we encourage you to apply for this fulfilling opportunity.



*** Only CV/Resumes With Track Record And Video Will Be Considered ***
