title: Content & Workbook Creation VA (AI + Transcripts ? Downloadable Workbook)
description:
I’m looking for a detail-oriented, reliable VA to help turn video content into a clear, structured workbook.



You will be working with approximately:



9 videos (~6 hours total)

Additional PDFs and resources I provide



Some of the content includes Q&A, so part of your role is organizing what’s useful and structuring it clearly.



This role uses AI tools (like ChatGPT) to speed up the process, but you still need good judgment to organize the information into something clean, clear, and usable.



Scope of Work:



Generate transcripts from provided videos (using tools — not manual typing)

Use ChatGPT (or similar AI tools) to extract and organize key content

Turn transcripts into a structured workbook (not just summaries — organized, usable material)

Incorporate additional resources (links, tools, instructions) into the content

Format everything cleanly in Google Docs

Ensure the document is easy to follow, well structured, and consistent throughout



Important:



You do NOT need to watch every video in full. This role is about working efficiently with transcripts and organizing information clearly using AI tools.



This is not a copy/paste task — I am looking for someone who can organize information and present it clearly.



Final Deliverable:



A clean, well-structured workbook in Google Docs that:



Is clearly organized with sections and headings

Includes prompts, summaries, or exercises where appropriate

Has consistent formatting throughout

Is easy to edit in Google Docs and can be converted directly into a downloadable PDF



Timeline:



Must be completed within 7 days



Compensation:



Fixed project rate (please include your quote)

Opportunity for ongoing work if it’s a good fit



Tools:



ChatGPT (or similar AI tools)

Google Docs

Transcription tools (your choice)



Who This Is For:



This role is a strong fit if you:



Are highly organized and detail-oriented

Can take AI-generated content and turn it into something clear and structured

Are comfortable using ChatGPT or similar tools daily

Think in terms of structure, not just tasks

Take ownership and produce clean, high-quality work



To Apply:



At the top of your application, write: READY



Then answer:



What tools would you use to generate transcripts from videos?

How would you use AI to turn transcripts into a structured workbook?

Share an example of a document or project where you organized complex information.



Notes:



Please only apply if you can complete this within the timeline and are comfortable working independently.



Reliable internet connection required.

title: CPA /Senior Accountant
description:
Are you ready to take your accounting career to the next level? We are a US-based real estate investment and management company seeking a talented and motivated Senior Accountant to join our growing international team. This is a remote, full-time role based in the Philippines, where you’ll work directly with our US leadership during US business hours.

If you’re passionate about real estate accounting, thrive in fast-paced environments, and want to contribute to exciting projects across multiple entities, this is the opportunity for you.



What You’ll Do

As our Senior Accountant, you’ll be a key player in keeping our financial operations accurate, compliant, and efficient. You won’t just be crunching numbers—you’ll be driving clarity and insights that help us grow.

Manage the full accounting cycle, including journal entries, reconciliations, and month/quarter-end close.

Prepare accurate financial statements and management reports.

Handle accounts payable/receivable, tenant ledgers, and vendor payments

Oversee bank reconciliations and investigate discrepancies.

Assist with budgeting, forecasting, and variance analysis.

Partner with CPAs during audits and tax filings.

Ensure compliance with US GAAP, Cash, and Modified Cash standards.

Maintain accurate financial data in AppFolio and QuickBooks Online (QBO).

Provide insightful reporting and analysis to the CFO and leadership team.



What We’re Looking For

We want someone who is not only technically strong but also proactive, communicative, and eager to add value.



Required:

Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.

3–5 years of accounting experience with a US-based real estate company.

Strong knowledge of property management and hospitality accounting.

Hands-on experience with AppFolio and QuickBooks Online (QBO).

Excellent English communication skills, both written and spoken.

Meticulous attention to detail, organizational strength, and reliability in meeting deadlines.

Flexibility to work US business hours.



Preferred:

CPA license (Philippines or US).

Experience with multi-entity structures and consolidations.

Familiarity with investor reporting and distributions.

Strong Excel skills, especially for financial modeling and analysis.



Why You’ll Love Working With Us

Competitive pay with long-term career growth opportunities.

A chance to work directly with US executives and decision-makers.

Exposure to exciting real estate and hospitality projects across the US.

A professional yet supportive team culture where your work is valued.

A stable role in an expanding international company with room to grow.



Here, your skills will make an immediate impact, and your career will grow alongside our company’s success.



If you’re ready to take ownership, make a difference, and build a rewarding career in real estate accounting, we’d love to meet you.



Apply now and become an essential part of our accounting team.

title: Seedance 2.0 Specialist
description:
Our fast-growing e-commerce brand is scaling toward 8-figures and beyond, and we're ready to level up our creative production with the power of Seedance 2.0. We're looking for a Seedance 2.0 Specialist to help us manage, refine, and execute AI-generated video ads that support our marketing goals.



To show you've carefully read this post, please start your response with the word peach before introducing yourself.

Below, you'll find the key responsibilities, requirements, and a few quick questions so we can get to know your experience.



Key Responsibilities:

- Prompt Creation & Optimization: Write, test, and refine prompts to generate high-quality video ads using Seedance 2.0.

- Workflow Coordination: Manage the full AI production pipeline—concept to final output—ensuring deadlines are met.

- Creative Alignment: Collaborate with our marketing and UGC teams to blend AI-generated content with human-made assets.

- Quality Review: Ensure all outputs are polished, on-brand, and ready for launch.

- Innovation & Mastery: Stay up to date with Seedance 2.0 features, updates, and best practices to keep us ahead of the curve.

- Documentation: Maintain a clear system for tracking prompts, revisions, and final deliverables.



Requirements:

- Hands-on experience with Seedance 2.0 and AI video generation.

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

- Ability to manage multiple creative projects at once.

- Good communication skills for working with both AI and human creators.

- Comfortable using project management tools like Google Sheets, Notion, or similar.

- Consistent availability for 6–8 hours daily, 6 days per week.

- Bonus: Background in marketing, video production, or AI prompt engineering.



Questions for You:



- Have you worked directly with Seedance 2.0 before? If so, tell us about your projects.

- How do you approach prompt testing and refining to get the best results?

- What's your system for keeping multiple AI video projects organized?

- Are you comfortable balancing both creative expectations and technical workflows?

- Can you commit to 6–8 hours per day, 6 days per week, for this role?



If you're passionate about AI-powered creativity and love working with cutting-edge tools like Seedance 2.0, we'd love to hear from you!

title: Online Chat Sales Specialist — High-Earning Remote Role
description:
We are hiring Chat Sales Specialists to join our growing remote team. You will be chatting with paying subscribers on a content platform, building relationships, and driving sales through conversation. This is a long-term, full-time position with real earning potential — not a one-time gig.

If you've ever worked in customer service, live chat, sales, virtual assistance, or even dating apps — and you're great at written English — this role will feel natural to you. We provide full training, scripts, and support. You just need to bring the right attitude and communication skills.

Why This Role Is Different:

This isn't a BPO call center. There are no phone calls. Everything is text-based. You'll be chatting one-on-one with subscribers, making them feel valued, and naturally guiding conversations toward purchases. Think of it as a mix between a sales rep and a relationship manager — all through messaging.

Your Day-to-Day:



Chat with subscribers via direct messages on a content platform

Build genuine connections that keep subscribers engaged and spending

Sell premium content using scripts and frameworks we provide

Adapt your communication style to match different subscriber personalities

Report your daily performance (messages, response time, sales)



Who We're Looking For:



Strong written English — you write naturally, not robotically. Slang, humor, and tone matter.

Typing speed of 50+ WPM

Laptop or desktop computer with stable internet (no phone-only setups)

Available for 8-hour shifts. We have morning, afternoon, and overnight shifts available.

You're a people person — you enjoy conversation and know how to make someone feel special

Hardworking, reliable, and coachable — you show up on time and take feedback well



Experience in any of these is a plus (but not required):



Live chat support or customer service

Online sales or telemarketing

Virtual assistant work

Social media management

CRM tools



What You'll Earn:



Base pay: $3–$5 per hour depending on experience

Performance-based commission on sales — our top earners make significantly more than base pay alone

Weekly or bi-weekly payments

Full training provided before you start — no experience in this specific industry needed



Shifts Available (US Eastern Time):



Morning: 6AM – 2PM EST

Afternoon: 2PM – 10PM EST

Overnight: 10PM – 6AM EST



Let us know which shift(s) work for you.



How to Apply

Please read carefully — applications that skip these steps will not be reviewed.



Click "Apply for this Job" and write us a message. Do NOT copy-paste a generic application.

In your message, include:



Your name and age

Which shift(s) you can work

Your typing speed (test at 
)

Your English level

Any relevant work experience (chat support, sales, VA, etc.)

Answer this question: "A paying customer messages you saying he's been feeling ignored and is thinking about leaving. What would you say to keep him?" (No right or wrong answer — we want to see how you communicate.)





At the very bottom of your message, write: "I have read the full description."



Thoughtful applications will be contacted with next steps. We are hiring on an ongoing basis — even if there's no immediate opening when you apply, strong candidates will be kept in our pipeline.

title: Brand Deal Fulfillment Coordinator
description:
We broker and manage brand partnerships on behalf of our creators — handling negotiations, deal structure, and execution so our talent can focus on making content. This role sits right at the center of that work.



We're looking for someone to own the execution side of our brand deals from close to delivery. You'll be the bridge between our brand clients and our talent — making sure creators are briefed, concepts get executed correctly, timelines are hit, and every deal lands cleanly.



From day one you'll be in direct contact with brands and talent on real, active campaigns. This is a coordination and accountability role, not a creative or strategy role. If you get satisfaction from making sure nothing falls through the cracks — and you want to learn the influencer business from the inside — this is the right seat.



—



HOW A DEAL MOVES THROUGH YOU



Receive & review the concept — Review deal terms and the creative brief. Make sure deliverables, usage rights, and deadlines are airtight before anything moves to the creator.

Brief the creator — Deliver the brief, confirm they understand expectations, and answer questions. You're the primary point of contact between the brand and talent during production.

Manage production & approvals — Track submissions, run the brand review process, and coordinate any revision requests or reshoots until the concept is signed off.

Confirm go-live — Verify content posted on schedule and all deliverable requirements were met.

Close it out — Alert accounting to send the invoice. Flag the completed deal to your manager so they can go after the next one.

—



QUALIFICATIONS



Required: · Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field · Strong written and verbal communication skills · Highly organized — able to manage multiple active deals simultaneously · Comfortable holding people to deadlines without burning the relationship · Detail-oriented — you catch when a submission doesn't match the brief



Preferred: · Prior experience in account management, talent coordination, PR, or agency operations · Familiarity with influencer marketing platforms (Grin, Aspire, or similar) · Working knowledge of major social platforms and how sponsorship disclosures work



—



THIS ROLE DOES NOT INCLUDE · Market research or trend analysis · Sourcing or pitching brand deals · Creative strategy or campaign concepting · Content creation or social media management



—





WHAT IT'S LIKE HERE



We care about output, not hours logged.



If you're early in your career, hungry to learn, and want to be close to where deals actually get made — we want to hear from you.



To be considered, please let respond by telling us the following in your response

1. Have you worked a deal fulfillment role before?

2. Are you someone who is extremely responsive on a moments notice?

3. What is your favorite animal and why?

title: Brand Communications Manager
description:
About the job



About Us:

Moe’s Group is a global leader in skincare manufacturing, trusted by more than 100 international beauty brands. We provide end-to-end product development solutions—from formulation and prototyping to production and scale-up. With world-class labs, clean formulations, and a commitment to transparency and quality, we help brands bring innovative skincare products to market efficiently and successfully. We are driven by excellence, customer satisfaction, and a workplace culture rooted in fairness, merit, and collaboration.



Brand and Client Experience Manager







Skincare Contract Manufacturing







Role summary



Own the end to end client experience from first contact through repeat purchase. Your job is to increase client satisfaction, reduce friction across sampling and production, improve retention and referrals, protect our reputation online, and ensure fast, professional responses across social and messaging channels.



This department does not exist yet. You will build it. That means you will design the processes, create the playbooks, set the standards, implement the reporting, and run the day to day execution yourself at the start. Later, you will help hire and train support under you. We need someone who is self motivated, resourceful, and comfortable creating structure from zero.



This role is cross functional. You will work daily with Sales, R&D, QA, Production, Packaging, and Logistics to standardize communication, tighten handoffs, prevent avoidable delays, and reduce escalations.



Primary outcomes you are responsible for

Within the first 90 days, you will deliver measurable improvements in:



Faster and clearer client onboarding and sampling experience



Higher sample to PO conversion

Higher repeat PO rate and lower churn

Improved Client NPS trend and lower detractor



Volume



Fewer escalations caused by unclear expectations,

label issues, claim confusion, or timeline surprises

Improved online reputation management including review response coverage and rating

trend

Improved response time and resolution quality across social and messaging channels

A functioning Client Experience and Reputation function with SOPs, templates, dashboards, and weekly cadence







Key responsibilities

Build the Client Experience function from zero

Audit the current journey and identify the biggest friction points

Design the client experience operating system: SOPs, templates, checklists, escalation paths, and reporting

Implement a weekly cadence for VOC review, issue review, and cross functional action items

Create a plan to scale the function by hiring and training support under you







Client journey ownership

Map the full client journey from inbound to sampling, compliance, production, and fulfillment

Identify friction points, delays, and failure modes

Build SOPs and playbooks that reduce back and forth and prevent surprises

Create clear handoff standards between Sales, R&D, QA, Production, Packaging, and Logistics







Voice of Client program

Run a Client NPS and feedback program

Survey at key milestones: sample shipped, sample approved, first PO shipped, ticket closed, and 60 to 90 day check in



Segment results by client type, product category, stage, account owner, and timelines



Turn feedback into a prioritized action plan with owners and deadlines

Report weekly on trend, drivers, and progress of fixes







Communication and expectation setting

Create standardized client communication templates for every stage such as onboarding, sampling updates, revision requests, approvals, production timelines, delays, and shipping

Define what we promise, what we do not promise, and how we communicate tradeoffs

Improve clarity on timelines, revisions, formula scope, stability, compliance, MOQ, packaging constraints, and change requests

Ensure the team adopts a consistent tone and process



Sampling and revision system

Standardize sampling workflow, revision limits, and decision checkpoints

Reduce sample loops by improving intake forms and decision criteria

Track sampling SLA from request to sample shipped and time from sample shipped to feedback

Monitor revision count per project and reasons for revisions





Escalation and recovery

Own the escalation playbook for delayed timelines, failed samples, packaging issues, labeling issues, and dissatisfied clients

Create recovery workflows that protect trust and prevent churn

Coordinate internal post mortems and document preventative actions





Reputation and trust management

Monitor and manage the company’s online reputation across key platforms such as Google Business Profile, LinkedIn,
, industry directories, and relevant review sites

Respond to reviews and comments in a professional, brand aligned, and policy compliant way, including both positive feedback and critical complaints

Build a review response playbook with templates, tone guidelines, and escalation rules for sensitive situations



Flag systemic issues surfaced in public reviews and route them into the Voice of Client program with clear owners and deadlines

Proactively increase review volume through ethical review generation workflows at the right milestones, without incentives that violate platform policies

Maintain accurate business listings across platforms including address, hours, phone, website links, and service descriptions





Social inbox and customer service coverage

Monitor inbound messages across social and messaging channels such as Instagram,
, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and website chat if applicable

Respond quickly and professionally, qualify inbound leads, and route requests to the correct internal owner



Create a saved replies library, tone guidelines, and escalation rules

Track response time, common questions, and themes that indicate confusion in marketing, website copy, or sales process

Build the plan to hire and train a Customer Experience Coordinator under you, including SOPs, templates, and quality checks





Internal enablement

Maintain a shared source of truth for every active client including timelines, deliverables, decisions, risks, and next steps

Build internal checklists for handoffs and stage gates

Train the team on the new standards and keep them adopted through weekly reinforcement and audits



Directives for how to operate in this role

Build first, then optimize

Do not wait for perfect tools or perfect data. Create structure quickly, then improve it iteratively



Reduce friction first

Every change must remove confusion, reduce delays, or reduce back and forth



Make promises precise

No vague timelines. No implied capabilities. Everything should be clear and documentedFeedback must turn into fixes

NPS, reviews, and inbox themes only matter if they become projects with owners, deadlines, and follow up





Protect compliance and credibility

Never allow unsupported claims, unclear labeling, or risky positioning to reach a client



Measure the process, not opinions

Use metrics to identify bottlenecks such as sampling SLA, revision cycles, time to first PO, repeat PO rate, escalations, on time delivery



Create systems that scale

Templates, checklists, dashboards, and SOPs beat heroics. Build repeatable workflows



Own the client narrative

If something slips, clients hear it early with options and a plan. No surprises



Cross functional wins only

You do not hand off problems. You coordinate solutions across teams until resolved



Protect reputation daily

Monitor review platforms and brand mentions consistently. Respond quickly, stay calm, and move issues to a private resolution path while documenting root causes internally



Never argue in public

Acknowledge, apologize when appropriate, state the next step, and take the resolution offline. The goal is trust, not winning



Inbox zero mindset

Social and messaging channels must not feel ignored. Keep response times tight, use templates, and escalate fast when needed



KPIs and weekly reporting

Client NPS overall and by segment

Top detractor themes and status of fixes

Sample SLA: request to sample shipped, shipped to feedback, revision count per project

Sample to PO conversion rate

Time to first PO



Repeat PO rate and reorder interval

Escalation volume and root causes

On time delivery performance for first PO clients

Review response time and response rate

Average star rating trend by platform

Review volume and review velocity

Top recurring review themes and operational fixes completed



Social inbox response time, response rate, and resolution time

Inbound message categories and lead routing performance

Department build progress: SOPs shipped, templates shipped, dashboard live, cadence running, adoption status







Required experience and skills

3 to 6 years in client experience, account management, operations, or brand partnerships in a B2B environment

Proven ability to build a function from scratch: creating SOPs, templates, reporting, and routines without heavy oversight

Strong process mindset and comfort creating order from chaos



Excellent writing for client communication, expectation setting, and issue handling



Comfort with skincare manufacturing concepts: ingredients basics, packaging constraints, stability, and compliance coordination

High ownership, calm under pressure, and strong escalation judgment

Ability to manage public facing responses on review platforms and social channels with professionalism and discretion







Nice to have

Experience in cosmetics manufacturing, packaging, supply chain, or compliance

Experience with HubSpot CRM workflows, ticketing systems, or operations dashboards

Experience managing social inbox tooling and building response libraries and escalation playbooks

Experience hiring or training support coordinators



Interview signals we are hiring for

Self starter who ships systems without being asked

Thinks in root causes and operational fixes

Writes clearly and professionally under pressure

Comfortable telling clients no and protecting boundaries

Understands manufacturing tradeoffs and does not overpromise

Handles public review responses calmly and professionally

Can build a support function that scales by hiring and training.



Turn feedback into a prioritized action plan with owners and deadlines



Why join us?

- 100% remote work opportunity

- Long-term stable job with significant room for professional growth.

- Fixed Weekends Off

- All necessary tools, courses, and subscriptions provided.



Learn more about our company by visiting our website: 
/. For the latest updates and opportunities, follow us on LinkedIn: www.
/company/moesgroup/

title: Part-Time Video Editor (Short Form + Long Form) — Long-Term Role
description:
Hi there,



I'm a VP at a national real estate company based in Chicago. I'm in the early stages of building out a content brand on LinkedIn and Instagram, and I need a dedicated editor to help me turn my long-form video and podcasts into polished short-form clips, AND to keep the long-form pieces clean and professional.



Important, and please read this carefully:



This is a part-time role that starts small. I don't have a massive content library yet. I'm building one. To start, expect roughly 10 to 20 hours a week. The workload will grow over time as my recording schedule ramps up, and I want one person to grow with it instead of starting over every few months.



If you're someone who needs 40 hours a week from day one, this isn't the right fit yet. If you have a main gig or other clients and want to add a long-term, reliable side role that could grow into more, keep reading.



You will NOT be client-facing. No calls, no
s to my customers. All your work is behind the scenes, supporting me.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO EACH WEEK



Short-form work (Reels, LinkedIn video, IG clips, 15 to 60 seconds)

- Cut punchy short-form clips from my long-form videos and podcasts

- Add burned-in captions, hooks, b-roll, light motion, and trending pacing

- Make sure every clip is scroll-stopping in the first 2 seconds



Long-form work (full videos, podcasts, 5 to 45 minutes)

- Edit full-length videos and podcast episodes start to finish

- Remove filler words, tighten pacing, fix audio, add b-roll and light graphics

- Keep the long-form pieces clean, professional, and on-brand



Thumbnails and covers

- Design thumbnails, cover images, and simple graphics

- Make the content look like it came from a professional studio



WHAT I NEED YOU TO ALREADY KNOW



I don't care which editing program you live in. Use what makes you fast and gets the best result. What I care about is that you can actually do both sides of the work.



ALSO REQUIRED



- Experience doing BOTH short-form and long-form edits. I need both, not just one.

- A strong eye for pacing, composition, clean captions, and readable thumbnails

- Clean audio editing skills — you know how to remove filler words, fix levels, and make voiceovers sound professional

- Strong written English (captions need to be accurate and well-formatted)



NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED)



- Motion graphics or After Effects basics

- Podcast editing experience

- Familiarity with LinkedIn and Instagram video best practices



WHAT THIS LOOKS LIKE FOR YOU



- 10 to 20 hours a week to start, with flexibility on when you work

- $300 to $500/month to start, based on experience and portfolio

- Paid on time every two weeks via PayPal or Wise

- Long-term role. As my content output grows, your hours and pay grow with it. This is meant to scale with me over the next year or two.

- 13th month bonus once you cross the 12-month mark



TO APPLY, PLEASE ANSWER THESE QUESTIONS IN YOUR REPLY



1. Send me a short-form clip (under 60 seconds) you cut from a longer piece. I want to see the actual work, not just hear about it. Tell me which tool you edited it in.

2. Send me one long-form piece (5 minutes or longer) you edited. Video or podcast, both fine. Tell me which tool you used.

3. Which editing tools do you use for short-form vs. long-form, and how long have you been using each?

4. Send me one thumbnail or cover graphic you've designed that you're proud of.

5. Are you currently working with other clients, and if so how many hours do you have open per week?

6. What's your internet speed and do you have a backup connection?

7. At the top of your reply, type the word "Chicago" so I know you actually read this post.



I read every application personally. Generic copy-paste replies get ignored. If you take 15 minutes to send me a real answer, I'll take 15 minutes to read it.



Thanks,

Peter

title: Digital Collaboration Specialist (With Sharepoint experience)
description:
ABOUT 10X HEALTH SYSTEM

10X Health System is a pioneering company at the forefront of the health and wellness industry, dedicated to revolutionizing the way individuals approach their personal health and well-being. With a philosophy rooted in the principle that optimal health is the foundation for a life lived to the fullest, 10X Health provides cutting-edge solutions and personalized health plans designed to empower individuals to achieve and maintain peak physical and mental performance. The company's comprehensive approach to health combines the latest advances in medical science, nutrition, fitness, and technology to offer a suite of services that include state-of-the-art diagnostic testing, individualized treatment protocols, and ongoing support from a team of world-class health professionals. 10X Health's commitment to innovation and results has established it as a leader in the health optimization space, catering to those who strive to push the boundaries of what is possible in their health journey.



POSITION SUMMARY

The Digital Collaboration Specialist supports the organization’s internal collaboration and knowledge management systems by maintaining SharePoint sites, building automated workflows, and developing visually consistent internal materials. This role helps ensure company resources, documentation, and tools are organized, accessible, and easy for teams to use. Working cross-functionally with multiple departments, the Digital Collaboration Specialist coordinates the collection and structuring of internal resources, supports the development of SharePoint pages and Power Automate workflows, and creates branded presentation templates and visual assets. The role plays an important part in improving operational efficiency by helping teams centralize information, streamline processes, and maintain consistent communication materials. This position requires a combination of technical proficiency, visual design capability, and strong organizational skills, with a focus on enabling teams to access the tools and information they need to work effectively.



OBJECTIVES

• Support the design, development, and maintenance of SharePoint sites to ensure internal resources are organized, accessible, and easy for teams to navigate.

• Build and maintain automated workflows using Power Automate to streamline operational processes and reduce manual administrative tasks.

• Create visually polished slide decks and presentation materials that align with company branding and communication standards.

• Develop and maintain presentation templates, style guides, and visual assets to promote consistency across internal communications and documentation.

• Coordinate with cross-functional teams to gather, organize, and centralize company resources, ensuring information is accurately documented and easily accessible.

• Maintain structured documentation of shared resources within SharePoint and other internal platforms to ensure information remains current and reliable.

• Monitor usage and collect feedback from internal stakeholders to support ongoing improvements to SharePoint sites, workflows, and internal documentation tools.

• Assist in identifying opportunities to improve efficiency through better use of digital tools, documentation, and automated processes.



COMPETENCIES

• High attention to detail, with a focus on quality control and consistency in branding, formatting, and content delivery.

• Skilled in creating standardized templates and assets that can be leveraged across the organization.

• Demonstrated proficiency with Microsoft SharePoint, Microsoft Office (PowerPoint, Word, Excel), and visual design tools such as Canva.

• Ability to produce clear, accurate documentation and visual content that simplifies complex information for diverse teams.

• Strong business acumen with the ability to understand operational priorities and translate them into effective solutions.

• Thorough grasp of company principles, frameworks, and messaging, with the ability to translate them into clear, engaging training content and internal communications that reinforce alignment and learning.

• Proficiency in visual tools and process mapping software such as L
 or similar platforms.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in Business, Communications, or a related field preferred, or equivalent professional experience in administrative, operations, or content.

• Prior experience supporting internal systems, content development, or process documentation in a fast-paced, cross-functional environment is a plus.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: Outbound Customer Insights Specialist (Telemarketing + User Research + Remote + US time)
description:
Fully Remote (must be available during US business hours, typically 8 AM – 5 PM EST / flexible within US time zones to align with target users)



Note: Upload a video to Google Drive to give an introduction about yourself and why you want to apply to this position.



Write personalized application. AI auto generated application will be rejected automatically.



* About the Role



We are looking for a sharp, proactive, and AI-savvy professional who thrives on reaching out to people, uncovering real problems, and turning those conversations into product-changing insights. This is not a traditional telemarketing or customer support role. You will run high-volume outbound calls and
s to US-based target users, dig deep into their daily workflows, and surface pain points that directly shape how our product is built. 



- Your critical thinking, observations, and recommendations will regularly influence the product roadmap.

- You will be the voice of the customer inside the company — someone who combines excellent outreach skills with strong analytical ability and fluency in AI tools to turn raw conversations into clear, actionable intelligence for the product team.



* Key Responsibilities



- Execute daily outbound calling and
ing campaigns to reach a high volume of target users in the US.

- Lead structured discovery conversations (phone +
) to identify workflow challenges, frustrations, and unmet needs.

- Document findings clearly and synthesize insights into concise reports, themes, and recommendations for the product, engineering, and design teams.

- Actively contribute ideas and suggestions that help shape product features and priorities.

- Use AI tools creatively and efficiently (e.g., for call/email personalization, conversation summarization, sentiment analysis, pattern detection, research, and follow-up automation).

- Track all interactions accurately.

- Meet weekly outreach and insight-quality targets while maintaining a professional, helpful, and engaging tone.

- Stay curious and continuously refine your approach based on what you learn from users.



* Requirements



- Strong critical thinking and analytical skills — you naturally spot patterns, ask great follow-up questions, and connect the dots between individual stories and broader product opportunities.

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills with the ability to quickly build rapport over the phone and in
.

- Proven experience in outbound calling, telemarketing, sales development, customer support, or user research (2+ years preferred).

- Fluent with AI tools at a practical level (you already use tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or similar for research, writing, summarization, or automation and can learn new ones quickly).

- Highly self-motivated and comfortable working independently in a remote environment.

- Available and productive during US business hours.

- Passion for understanding how people work and a genuine desire to make products better through real user feedback.

- No specific degree required — we care about your ability to think, communicate, and deliver insights.



* Application

- Show us your work ethnics. Tell us about how you work and what you would do to make your team respect and trust you.

title: AI Specialist / Automation Expert (AI Agents for U.S. Debt Collection Company)
description:
Job Description:



We are a U.S.-based debt collection company looking to bring on a highly capable AI specialist to help us integrate artificial intelligence into our daily operations and develop custom AI agents.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building systems from the ground up and can take ideas and turn them into real, working solutions.



We operate in a compliance-driven environment, so attention to detail and structured thinking is important.



What You'll Be Doing:

Identify opportunities to use AI within a debt collection / accounts receivable environment



Build and deploy AI agents for:

Customer communication 
, SMS, chat — compliant messaging)

Internal workflows and automation

Data analysis and reporting (payments, accounts, trends)

Integrate AI tools with existing systems (CRM, spreadsheets, payment systems)

Help design systems that improve response rates and operational efficiency

Continuously optimize AI-driven processes



Tools / Skills (Preferred):

Experience with AI tools:

ChatGPT / OpenAI APIs

Claude, Gemini, or similar



Automation platforms:

Zapier, Make (Integromat), n8n, or similar

Basic coding (Python, JavaScript, or similar)

Experience building AI agents, chatbots, or workflow automations

Familiarity with CRMs, APIs, Google Sheets

Bonus: Experience in collections, fintech, or compliance-heavy industries

Important Note (Compliance):



This role involves working within a regulated industry (debt collection).

You do not need prior experience in collections, but you must be comfortable:



Following structured guidelines

Building systems that adhere to rules and compliance standards

Avoiding misleading or aggressive messaging in automation



What We're Looking For:

Someone who can think independently and problem-solve

Strong communicator (clear English)

Able to take a general idea and turn it into a working system

Detail-oriented and organized

Reliable and responsive

Interested in long-term work



Compensation:

Starting at $6–$10/hour depending on experience

Raises based on performance

Potential bonuses for successful AI implementations





Please include:



Your experience with AI and automation

Examples of systems, bots, or workflows you've built

What tools you prefer and why

A brief idea of how you would use AI in a collections or accounts receivable business



Bonus: Include the word "Compliance" in your subject line so I know you read everything.



Why This Role is Unique:



You’ll be helping build AI systems in an industry where very few companies are doing this well.

There is significant opportunity to create tools that directly impact revenue and performance.

title: SEO Specialist (On-Page & Off-Page) – Watch Brand (Remote)
description:
We are looking for an experienced **SEO Specialist** to help grow the online visibility of our watch brand, **Trémont**.



The goal of this role is to improve our presence on **Google search**, increase organic traffic, and build long-term SEO foundations that drive consistent growth.



This role requires someone who understands both **on-site SEO and off-site SEO**, and who can work strategically to improve rankings over time.



This is a **remote role** and we are looking for someone who can take ownership of the SEO strategy rather than simply follow instructions.



---



**Key Responsibilities**



• Conduct keyword research relevant to watches, fashion accessories, and lifestyle products

• Optimize website pages for SEO (titles, meta descriptions, headings, internal linking)

• Improve product page and collection page SEO

• Identify opportunities to rank for high-value search terms

• Develop and execute **off-page SEO strategies** (backlinks, outreach, partnerships)

• Work on improving the technical SEO health of the website

• Plan and optimize **blog content for SEO**

• Identify blog topics that can rank on Google and bring organic traffic

• Track SEO performance and recommend improvements

• Monitor competitors and identify ranking opportunities



---



**Blog Responsibilities**



You will also help guide our **in-house blog strategy**, including:



• Keyword research for blog articles

• SEO optimization for blog posts

• Suggesting article topics that attract organic search traffic

• Ensuring blog content supports SEO growth



---



**Requirements**



• Proven experience in SEO (please share examples of websites you have helped rank)

• Strong understanding of **on-page SEO and off-page SEO**

• Experience with keyword research tools

• Understanding of technical SEO fundamentals

• Experience working with Shopify websites is a plus

• Ability to explain SEO strategies clearly

• Strong English communication skills







**Nice to Have**



• Experience working with ecommerce brands

• Experience with fashion or watch brands

• Familiarity with tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, or Google Search Console







**Compensation**



Starting at **$200/month** with opportunity to increase based on performance and results.







**IMPORTANT – APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS**



To be considered, please follow these instructions:



1. Start your application with the word **TREMONT**

2. Share **one example website you helped rank on Google**

3. Briefly explain **what you would do first to improve SEO for a watch brand**

4. Include your **expected monthly salary**



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Aesthetic Social Media Manager – Plastic Surgery (Before/After + Paid Ads + High-End Branding)
description:
We are a Beverly Hills plastic surgery practice seeking a high-level Social Media Manager with experience in aesthetic medicine, before/after organization, and paid marketing (PPC). This role includes content creation, before/after photo management, and paid advertising. This is NOT a basic posting job. We are looking for someone who understands luxury branding and patient conversion.



Responsibilities: Create and manage Instagram, TikTok, and
 content. Produce high-end reels and posts that attract real patients. Maintain a clean, luxury aesthetic appropriate for a Beverly Hills plastic surgery practice. Organize before and after photos systematically. Ensure proper lighting consistency, cropping, alignment, labeling, and categorization. Distribute before and after content across Instagram, TikTok,
, RealSelf, and provide to our website management team. Manage and run paid advertising campaigns on Instagram,
, and Google Ads for medspa and aesthetic services. Optimize campaigns for leads and conversions, not just clicks. Track and report performance.



Requirements: Experience with plastic surgery or medspa marketing. Strong understanding of before and after presentation. Experience running paid ads on Meta (Instagram/Facebook) and Google. Skilled in tools such as CapCut, Adobe, Photoshop or equivalent. Not Canva-only.



Do not apply if: You only use Canva templates. You have no before and after experience. You have never run paid ads. You cannot show real accounts you personally managed.



Required test: Create one Instagram post for a Beverly Hills plastic surgeon. 1) Before and after post using any sample images, must look real, clean, and high-end. 2) Write a professional caption including a call to action. 3) Provide one reel idea that would attract patients.



Required submission format: 1) Three Instagram accounts you personally managed. 2) One example of organized before and after work (folder system or samples). 3) One paid ad campaign you ran (results or screenshots preferred). 4) The test assignment. 5) List of tools you use.

title: Gaming YouTube Script Writer (HSR, ZZZ, JRPGs)
description:
A dream job for a gamer who loves to write!



I run a growing YouTube channel focused on gacha games and JRPGs. I’m looking for a script writer who genuinely loves gaming and can turn messy, complex game info (kits, lore, story beats, community drama, patch changes) into scripts that are easy to follow, entertaining and accurate.



YOU WILL BE WRITING ACROSS:

- Zenless Zone Zero (required deep knowledge)

- Honkai: Star Rail (required deep knowledge)

- JRPGs and other upcoming games (example: a plot summary for a Dragon Quest remaster)

- Future games (example: Ananta)



One week you might write a ZZZ character lore breakdown and a “push or skip” video for Honkai Star Rail. The next week you might write a story summary or “what you need to know” video for a completely different game.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

Write YouTube scripts for:



- Character guides, lore explainers, “pull or skip”, patch overviews and other stuff that audiences might like

- Plot summaries and recaps (spoiler-safe when required)

- Short-form scripts (Shorts/Reels style)

- Take complicated mechanics or lore and make them simple for everyday viewers

- Match different tones depending on the audience and video goal (funny, serious, hype, explanatory, story-time)

- Suggest video opportunities based on what’s trending in the games we cover (patch cycles, banners, drama, community interest, search demand)



REQUIRED:

- No agency submissions - I’m looking for individuals who want to be part of a team yet enjoy working from home

- No AI-written scripts: when it comes to game guides, AI is often inaccurate and misses nuance. I’m hiring a human writer for a reason.

- Strong existing knowledge of Zenless Zone Zero and Honkai: Star Rail, including characters and lore (you will be asked specific questions to confirm this)

- Adaptable to learning new games fast

- Able to write clearly and logically, with strong pacing and hooks

- Fast delivery without sacrificing quality

- A PC, mobile device or console capable of playing the games we cover (ZZZ, HSR, and upcoming titles). Must be able to easily download and play new games that may need coverage.



NICE TO HAVE:

- A sense of humour 

- You already watch gaming YouTube and understand retention, hooks, pacing and “why people keep watching”

- You write and read A LOT

- You can pitch strong titles hooks, and thumbnail text options



PAY STRUCTURE (PATHWAY):

This role starts as per-script, with clear upside for great work.



Step 1: 8-week paid trial (pay-per-script)



- Pay per script based on length/format

- Clear deadlines agreed before each script

- Must be open to revisions and feedback (especially the first few weeks to get the tone of voice right with the YouTube channel)



Step 2: If we work well together



- We move to a small monthly retainer for a set number of scripts (still part-time), with extra scripts priced at the same per-script rate.



To apply: include your preferred rates for:



1. Your per-script rate (in PHP) for each format:



3–5 min script: $___

6–10 min script: $___

10–30 min script: $___



2. Your preferred monthly retainer after the trial (and what it includes):



“$___/month for ___ scripts” (tell me the mix and revision limits)





HOW TO APPLY



Send:

 1. A short intro about you and your gaming background

 2. Your writing samples (scripts preferred, otherwise any strong writing)

 3. Your rates per script length (listed above)

 4. Your weekly availability and typical turnaround time per script

 5. Confirm what device you use to play ZZZ/HSR (PC/mobile/console)

 6. Answer the short TEST TASKS below (copy/paste responses in your application)





TEST TASKS:

1. What’s your Honkai Star Rail or Zenless Zone Zero UID and region?

2.Describe the entire plot of Honkai Star Rail’s Amphoreus in 3 sentences or less. And make it personal and funny.

3. What's your favourite side quest in HSR or ZZZ, and why?

4. What’s the first JRPG you ever played, and what did you enjoy most about it?

5. Writing task: In
words only, explain how Honkai Star Rail’s Cyrene works to a brand new player.



NO AI-WRITTEN RESPONSES PLEASE! Any AI detection will result in the immediate rejection of your application.

title: CAREER OPPORTUNITY »» Content Quality Analyst ¤ Full Time ¤
description:
We’re hiring a Content Quality Analyst to help ensure the quality and consistency of web content across our firm’s website. This junior-level role is well-suited for someone who’s detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable working within legal subject matters. You should be confident reviewing content with a critical eye, open to learning, and willing to speak up when you spot issues or areas for improvement. You’ll also work with other teams to keep everything consistent and up to standard across the site. A legal background isn’t required, but the ability to understand legal concepts and apply established guidelines accurately is essential.



Ready to Apply?

Send your resume to 



Key Responsibilities:

-Review web content for legal marketing compliance, factual and conceptual accuracy, grammar, and readability.

-Conduct regular audits of web pages for both content and technical issues.

-Ensure SEO best practices are implemented throughout all content (keywords, meta tags, headers, etc.).

-Perform basic technical checks (e.g., internal links, alt text, metadata, formatting).

-Coordinate with different teams to ensure consistent application of content standards.

-Track content updates and maintain documentation of reviews and recommendations.

-Support the development of internal content standards and style guides.



Qualifications And Skills:

-Excellent attention to detail and the ability to identify content inconsistencies or errors.

-Strong organizational and time management skills.

-Ability to follow complex editorial, legal, and brand standards accurately.

-Fast learner with the ability to adapt to legal content and digital platforms.

-Strong written communication and analytical skills.

-Familiarity with legal terminology, especially in the U.S. legal landscape (preferred).

-Understanding of basic website development concepts such as HTML tags and page structure (preferred).



Basic Requirements:

-Device Specifications: Intel i5 processor or higher with a minimum of 8GB RAM

-Equipment: Webcam, speakers, and a microphone or headphones

-Internet Speed: Minimum of 100Mbps with a backup connection in case of outages



Work Details:

-Working Hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Standard Time | Tuesday to Saturday, 12 AM to 8:30 AM Manila Time

-Location: Anywhere in the Philippines



Why Join Us?

-Stable employment

-Competitive salary

-Bi-monthly salary

-A-Z benefits, including bonuses and annual raises

-Work-life balance 

-Work-from-home opportunity



Virtual Office Setup: We ask tea
mbers to maintain a virtual office via Google Meet with cameras on during work hours. This helps us simulate an in-office environment, encourages collaboration, and ensures everyone is present and engaged throughout the day, even while working remotely.



Note: The company uses a time tracker to ensure productivity and accountability.



Direct Hire:

This is a direct hire position — you will be employed and managed directly by our company, not through an agency or third party.



Important Note:

Do not send your application via our social media platforms or website contact forms. Failure to follow this instruction may result in disqualification.

ntum to our operations. You’ll work directly with the owner, be involved in real deals, and help us scale. You’ll also support our rental property business as needed.

- CRM management — keep deal data accurate and organized

You’re a Fit If Your

- Resourceful — you figure things out and get it done

- Comfortable making calls and working with professionals

QuickBooks experience is a plus, but not required if you’re willing to learn.

If you’re organized, proactive, and excited to use AI to solve problems and move faster — we’ll give you the tools and opportunity to grow. This role has the potential to become an Operations Manager position as we scale.





What You’ll Be Doing



- Bookkeeping — categorize expenses, reconcile accounts, keep clean financials in QuickBooks

- Transaction coordination — work with title companies, vendors, and county offices to keep deals moving

- Follow-up & accountability — make sure tasks and deadlines don’t slip across the team

- KPI tracking — build simple reports so we always know where things stand

- Research — find realtors, vendors, and service providers as needed

- CRM management — keep deal data accurate and organized

- Automation — use AI tools to eliminate repetitive work and improve efficiency



You’re a Fit If Your



- Organized and detail-obsessed

- Proactive — you follow up without being asked

- Resourceful — you figure things out and get it done

- Comfortable making calls and working with professionals

- Ownership mindset — you don’t need daily hand-holding

- Growth-oriented — you want to learn and take on more over time

QuickBooks experience is a plus, but not required if you’re willing to learn.



The Details



- Full-time, US business hours, remote

- Reports to the owner, working alongside our sales lead

- Compensation: Competitive, based on experience



How to Apply

We don’t hire off resumes — we hire off results.



Complete our skills challenge. See your score and live ranking instantly on our public leaderboard. **Top 10 advance to a paid project task.**



[START THE CHALLENGE USING LINK BELOW]

title: Tech Ops and Automation Manager: $1,500–$2,000 USD PER MONTH
description:
Start rate: $1,500–$2,000 per month (based on experience)

Paid once per month via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.



If you’re someone who wants to take full ownership and build systems that scale, this role is for you!



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours per week (Flexible hours)

- Long-term stability: Not a short-term freelance contract.

- Stable monthly income: On-time payments via Wise

- Growth path: Opportunity to take full ownership of our tech stack

- High impact: Your systems directly affect revenue, retention, and team efficiency

- Supportive environment: No micromanagement, high ownership culture

- Tools provided: We cover the software you need



YOUR IMPACT



Your work reduces manual admin work.

Your systems improve onboarding and fulfillment speed.

Your dashboards increase visibility into performance metrics.

Your automations help the company scale cleanly.

You do not just build workflows.

You build infrastructure.



TASKS



Systems & Automation

- Build and manage advanced Airtable systems (multi-table databases, linked records, dashboards, KPIs)

- Create and maintain automations using 
, Zapier, and n8n

- Set up Slack automations (channel creation, alerts, routing, reminders, triggers)

- Connect tools across the company (CRM, forms, surveys, Slack, Airtable, Kajabi)

- Monitor automations daily and proactively fix issues

- Reduce manual processes across departments

- Kajabi & Fulfillment Support

- Manage Kajabi automations (onboarding flows, tagging, access control,
 triggers)

- Automate client onboarding (intake - Slack access - CRM tracking - milestone tracking)

- Improve fulfillment systems with dashboards, alerts, and progress tracking

- Build reporting for activation, retention, churn, revenue, and team performance



Architecture & Optimization

- Suggest better system structures as we grow

- Document all workflows clearly

- Build scalable foundations instead of temporary fixes

- Own and protect our automation infrastructure



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken)

- Advanced Airtable experience

- Advanced 
 experience

- Experience with Slack automations and integrations

- Experience with Zapier

- Strong understanding of APIs and webhooks

- Strong systems thinking (you think in architecture, not tasks)

- Ability to translate business problems into technical solutions

- Proactive mindset and high ownership

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace



STRONG PLUS



- n8n experience

- Kajabi automation experience

- CRM integrations (Close is a plus)

- Experience building KPI dashboards

- Experience supporting onboarding and fulfillment workflows

- Experience in fast-growing online businesses

- Experience with 7–9 figure digital brands



WHY JOIN US?



- $1,500–$2,000 per month based on experience

- Long-term stability

- High ownership role

- Direct impact on company growth

- Clear opportunity to become Head of Systems / Automation Lead

- Work with a fast-moving digital company

- All tools and software covered



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with “TECH OPS” as the message title

2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV

#2: Your years of experience with Airtable

#3: Your years of experience with 

#4: Your experience with n8n (if any)

#5: A short description of the most advanced system you have built

#6: One sentence on why you are a strong fit for this role



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



We look forward to building scalable systems with you.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Direct Response Video Editor — eCom Ads (Facebook / Instagram)
description:
We are a fast-growing direct response skincare brand selling in Germany. We run paid ads on
 and Instagram at high volume and we need an editor who understands how content actually performs, not just how it looks.

What you will be doing:



Editing 5 to 10 videos per day

Formats range from 30 seconds to 5 minutes: UGC, native, talking head, AI-generated footage

You will receive complete briefs: script, B-roll, references, and examples of winning ads

You must understand what makes content feel native on Instagram and TikTok: pacing, captions, cuts, sound design



Tools you will use:



Your primary editing software (Premiere, CapCut, DaVinci or equivalent)

Vmake: access provided by our company

Higgsfield: access provided by our company

HeyGen: access provided by our company

ElevenLabs: access provided by our company

Comfort with AI-generated footage and AI voiceover is required. You will be working with it regularly.



What we need from you:



Proven experience editing direct response ads or high-volume UGC content

Deep understanding of Instagram and TikTok content codes. You know why some videos stop the scroll and others do not

Ability to follow a brief precisely and deliver on time every day

Common sense. If something looks off, you flag it before delivering. You do not wait to be told the obvious.

Someone determined, autonomous, and hungry to grow with a brand that is scaling fast



What this job is not:



This is not a creative direction role. Briefs are provided, you execute

This is not a wedding or corporate video role

If you cannot deliver 5 to 10 videos per day consistently, this is not the right fit

If you need your hand held for every small decision, this is not the right fit



What we offer:



900 USD per month

Performance bonuses for editors whose videos become winning ads

Real growth opportunity. We promote from within and reward people who perform



To apply:

Send us two to three examples of direct response or UGC ads you have edited. Tell us your daily output in your last role. Any application without examples will not be considered.

title: Executive Assistant & Customer Success Specialist (SaaS)
description:
Job Title: Executive Assistant and Customer Success Specialist (SaaS)



- Location: Remote (Work from Home)

- Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

- Salary: $7.00 – $8.00 USD/hour (Negotiable based on experience)

- Experience: Minimum 2+ years in a similar role



The Role:

We are looking for a high-energy, tech-savvy Executive Assistant to become the right hand to our company founder and the face of our customer service. This isn't just an admin role; you will own the entire customer experience for our software, bridging the gap between our users and our development team.



You must be fluent in English, professional on camera, and possess the tech-intuition to learn new software inside and out within days, not weeks.



Key Responsibilities:

- Customer Success and Support: Take full ownership of the software’s customer service. Resolve tickets, engage with users, and ensure a world-class experience.

- Client Interface: Jump on Zoom calls with clients to provide support, demos, or troubleshooting with confidence and a likable personality.

- Bridge to Dev Team: Identify, document, and report bugs to our tech team. You will be the translator between user feedback and technical fixes.

- Documentation and SOPs: You are an organization wizard. You will create and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and keep our FAQs/Help Center updated and easy to navigate.

- Executive Support: Manage schedules and administrative tasks for the Lead Hacker to ensure maximum efficiency.



Requirements:

- 2+ Years Experience in an EA or Customer Success role (SaaS experience is a major bonus).

- Perfect English: Exceptional verbal and written communication skills are non-negotiable.

- Tech-Fluent: You understand how software works and can talk to developers without getting lost.

- Hyper-Organized: You find joy in documentation, clean folders, and efficient workflows.

- Professional Presence: You are well-presented and personable on video calls.

- Quick Learner: You can grasp complex software features rapidly.

- Bonus Points If... 

     You have a background in Project Management.

     You have previously worked for a SaaS startup.

     You have experience with tools like Slack, Jira, Notion, or Zendesk.



Why Join Us?

- Immediate start for the right candidate.

- Stable, long-term full-time employment.

- Opportunity to work closely with a Lead Hacker and grow within a tech-driven environment.



How to Apply:

- Please send your resume along with a brief (1-2 minute) Loom video introducing yourself. We want to see your personality and hear your English fluency.

- Note: Applications without a video or a personalized cover letter will not be considered.

title: Full-Time Video Editor and Social Media Manager
description:
Full-Time Video Editor and Social Media Manager

Location Remote or Hybrid

Type Full-Time



Overview

We are looking for a high-output, creative video editor and social media operator to handle the full pipeline of content from Twitch streams to viral clips.



This role is not just about cutting footage. You will be responsible for turning raw VODs into engaging, high-retention content across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram,
 or X, and more.



You must understand internet humor, pacing, and audience retention at a high level. This includes 
 timing, comedic edits, and knowing what actually performs on modern platforms.



What You Will Do

Edit Twitch VODs into long-form YouTube videos

Create short-form vertical content for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts

Identify and extract high-performing, viral-worthy 
nts

Apply fast-paced, retention-focused editing with quick cuts, zooms, subtitles, sound effects, and 
 overlays

Repurpose content into multiple formats optimized for each platform

Schedule and post content across all social platforms

Maintain a consistent posting cadence

Handle thumbnails, captions, hashtags, and upload formatting

Track performance and iterate based on what works



Editing Style Requirements

You must be comfortable editing in a fast-paced, humor-driven style similar to the following:







We are specifically looking for:

Fast-paced editing with minimal dead air

Strong comedic timing and punchline delivery

Heavy use of subtitles, sound effects, and visual emphasis


-aware editing that feels current and not outdated



Culture Fit Important

You cannot be sensitive to humor

Content may include dark humor, offensive jokes, and unfiltered commentary

You must understand the difference between humor and malice

If you are easily offended, this is not the role for you



Requirements

Proven experience editing gaming or Twitch content

Experience creating short-form vertical videos

Strong understanding of TikTok, Shorts, and Reels algorithms

Proficiency in Premiere Pro, After Effects, or similar tools

Ability to work fast without sacrificing quality

Ability to consistently deliver content on schedule



Bonus Skills

Thumbnail design

Motion graphics

Experience managing or growing social media accounts



What Success Looks Like

Consistent output of daily or near-daily content

Videos that retain attention, get shared, and grow the audience

Ability to predict what content will perform before posting



Compensation

Competitive salary based on experience

Optional performance bonuses tied to content growth



How to Apply

Submit your portfolio

Include examples of long-form and short-form edits

Optional sample edit from one of our VODs

title: Operations Manager – CEO Support (Remote – Philippines)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a highly experienced Operations Manager to provide dedicated support to the CEO of a growing U.S.-based fintech company. This is a senior management role responsible for leading operations, managing executive communications, coordinating internal and external stakeholders, and ensuring smooth day-to-day operations. You will work directly with leadership in a high-volume, fast-paced environment where proactiveness and ownership are non-negotiable.



What You Will Do

• Manage the CEO’s calendar — scheduling with internal teams, lenders, and merchants

• Own the inbox: monitor, triage, and respond to 50+
s daily with accuracy and professionalism

• Serve as the communication hub between leadership and all internal/external partners

• Track open items, action plans, and deadlines to ensure consistent follow-through

• Maintain CRM records in HubSpot and documentation in Confluence / Google Docs

• Prepare internal reports, summaries, and status updates for the CEO

• Handle day-to-day operational tasks and reduce the CEO’s administrative burden



What We Require

• Minimum 5 years of experience as an Operations Manager, Chief of Staff, Director of Operations, or in a similar senior operations leadership role

• REQUIRED: Background in financial services, fintech, or lending

• PREFERRED: Experience working with U.S.-based companies

• Excellent written and verbal English (near-native level required)

• Proven ability to manage high-volume
 communication independently

• Strong proficiency in HubSpot, Google Workspace, Slack, Confluence, and AI tools

• High sense of accountability, confidentiality, and independent decision-making

• Available Mon–Fri, 9 AM–5 PM Eastern Time (U.S. hours)



What We Offer

• Fully remote, stable long-term employment with a growing U.S.-based company

• Direct exposure to executive leadership and business operations

• Opportunity to build and own the operations function from the ground up

• Career growth potential as the function is expected to expand over time

• A fast-paced, results-driven culture that values ownership and accountability

title: Executive / Virtual / Personal Assistant
description:
Virtual Assistant / Executive Assistant (Remote, Part-Time, Full-Time Growth)

 

We’re seeking a proactive, highly organized Virtual Assistant to support an entrepreneur with a dynamic lifestyle and multiple business interests. This role spans travel coordination, financial admin, personal projects, digital content support, and more. Ideal for someone resourceful, tech-savvy, and detail-oriented. 



This is a remote, part-time position (20 hours/week with growth to full-time, benefits and bonuses). Requiring 1-2 hours overlap with Pacific Time when it’s needed to reach out to businesses that may only be open 8-5 PST for example. Typically we’d have 1 video meeting per week on Mondays to discuss the priorities and other work is flexible to be completed on your own time with due dates in mind. 



 

Key Responsibilities

• Manage calendars, inboxes, scheduling, prioritization, and follow-through

• Coordinate travel including flights, hotels, transportation, itineraries

• Support property-related needs such as short term airbnb management, scheduling vendors, services, invoices, and monitoring recurring tasks.

• Track and organize expenses; maintain spreadsheet-based reports

• Conduct online research for vendors, pricing, products, market data, and personal projects

• Order essential items, track deliveries/returns, and coordinate gifts and services when needed

• Book personal appointments - health, wellness,, dining, etc.

• Administrative tasks including streamlining personal and business systems

• Learn new tools independently and proactively research solutions without needing step-by-step instruction



 

Requirements

• Excellent spoken and written English with clear, professional communication.

• Prior experience with customer service, spreadsheets, research, travel planning, or financial admin is strongly preferred.

• Highly organized, detail-oriented, consistent, and dependable with reliable internet and computer access.

• Strong Google Workspace proficiency—especially Sheets (formulas, formatting, data cleanup; bonus if pivot tables are familiar).

• Resourceful problem solver—able to complete tasks independently, including entirely new tasks by researching how to do them

• Comfortable using AI tools with the understanding that all outputs must be verified, fact-checked, and properly organized before delivery

• Enjoys learning new tools: Google Workspace, Asana, Claude, ChatGPT, Canva, financial and travel platforms.

• High integrity, ownership mindset, and commitment to delivering accurate, timely, polished work.

• Ability to work autonomously while being accessible for periodic check-ins (e.g., short AM/PM PST  windows).

 

Benefits

• Part-time start (20h first month) with plans to grow into a long-term, full-time role within 1-3 months

• Flexible remote work with weekly check-ins to align the agenda for the week

• Opportunity to learn new systems, take on higher-level projects, and grow with the businesses



Core Values

• Be open, authentic, and communicate with clarity and integrity.

• Take passionate ownership—deliver what you promise, learn from mistakes, and bring solutions.

• Be resourceful, proactive, and committed to customer success.

• Work well with others—show empathy, respect time, and maintain humility with confidence.

• Bloom where you are planted—embrace growth, creativity, and pride in your work.

• Have fun and bring positive energy while striving for excellence.

 



How to Apply

Please submit your application through the form below. Only candidates who complete the form will be considered along with up to date resumes, including months + year to show total duration in a role/company. There will be a loom video exercise to show communication and understanding.




 





Job description link 







Salary:
per month depending on total hours and experience

title: Davinci Resolve- Full Time Editor
description:
About VYBE



VYBE is a Chicago-based photo and video company bringing brands to life through bold, high-energy content. From product launches and social campaigns to large-scale event activations, we create visuals that feel real, engaging, and built to move people.



We’re growing fast and building a team of creatives who want to grow with us.



The Role



We’re looking for a Full-Time Remote Video Editor who lives in DaVinci Resolve.



This isn’t just about cutting clips — it’s about shaping stories, building energy, and creating content people actually want to watch. You’ll be editing everything from fast-paced social reels to polished brand pieces and event recaps.



If you’re someone who cares about the feel of a video just as much as the technical side, you’ll fit right in.



Why We Use DaVinci Resolve



We run everything through Resolve because it allows real collaboration — shared timelines, live updates, consistent color, and a smoother workflow across the team.



It keeps us fast, efficient, and creatively aligned on every project.



What You’ll Do

Edit branded content, product features, and social-first videos

Craft high-energy reels and longer-form storytelling pieces

Organize footage, timelines, and project assets cleanly

Work closely with our creative director to dial in revisions

Maintain VYBE’s signature pacing, color, and overall feel

Stay tapped into trends and bring fresh ideas to the table

What We’re Looking For

Advanced experience in DaVinci Resolve (non-negotiable)

Strong instincts for pacing, music syncing, and storytelling

Reliable, responsive, and deadline-driven

Organized and detail-focused (this matters a lot here)

Open to feedback and constantly improving

Positive energy — we move fast and keep it collaborative

What You Get

Fully remote, full-time position

Consistent work with real brands and real impact

Opportunity to grow with a fast-moving creative company

Flexible schedule (we care about deadlines, not micromanaging)

A team that actually collaborates and pushes each other creatively

How to Apply



No résumé needed — your work speaks louder.



Send us:



A few samples of your work (social or brand content preferred)

A quick intro about you, your experience, and what excites you about editing



Subject line:

VYBE DAVINCI EDITOR 2026 — [Your Name]

description:

We are a fast-growing e-commerce company in the Beauty & Health space, looking for a Shopify Store Manager / Operations Manager who can take ownership of our stores and operations.
