title: Technical Customer Support Associate
Content & Admin VA for a Maui-Based Women's Coaching Brand (CapCut + Canva)
description:
JOB TITLE

Content & Admin VA for a Maui-Based Women's Coaching Brand (CapCut + Canva)



 JOB TYPE

Part-time  ·  10–15 hours per week  ·  Long-term preferred



SALARY / RATE

$5 – $8 per hour (based on experience)

Weekly pay via Wise or PayPal  ·  Paid on time, every time



JOB OVERVIEW



Aloha! I'm a women's coach and content creator based in Maui, Hawaii. I'm building a TikTok + Pinterest content engine to grow my coaching practice, and I need a reliable, detail-oriented Content VA to help me bring it to life.



This is a **long-term role** for someone who's organized, creative, and genuinely excited about content that helps women heal, rebuild, and rise. You'll be the person turning my raw voice memos and scripts into finished TikTok videos, posting them, and keeping my content rhythm steady.



If you're looking for a kind, direct, communicative employer who pays on time and treats you like a teammate — let's talk.



WHAT YOU WILL DO (Your Core 5)



1. **Edit faceless voiceover TikToks** in CapCut from my raw audio + scripts (captions, b-roll, transitions, on-screen text, trending audio under voiceover)

2. **Design Pinterest pins in Canva** (using templates I'll provide) and post 3–5 per week

3. **Post and schedule** content on TikTok, Instagram, and Pinterest (native apps, no third-party schedulers)

4. **Light inbox + DM triage** (flag important messages, archive noise) + manage Calendly booking confirmations

5. **Maintain the content calendar** in a shared Google Doc or Notion page



REQUIRED SKILLS



- **CapCut** — confident with trimming, captions, transitions, b-roll overlays, text animations

- **Canva** — comfortable working from templates (no original graphic design needed)

- **Native posting** on TikTok, Instagram, and Pinterest

- **Clear written English** — able to write captions in my voice after I give you a style guide

- **Reliable internet** and a quiet workspace

- **At least 2 hours of timezone overlap** with Hawaii Standard Time (HST, UTC-10)

- **Detail-oriented and self-managed** — I do not micromanage



NICE TO HAVE (Not Required)



- Pinterest business account experience

- ChatGPT or Claude fluency for caption brainstorming

- Experience editing faceless voiceover content specifically

- Knowledge of coaching, wellness, or personal development niches



WHAT I OFFER



- **Long-term, stable work** (I'm looking for someone for 6+ months, not a one-off project)

- **Weekly pay, on time, every time** (via Wise or PayPal)

- **Kind and direct communication** — I give feedback clearly and respect your time

- **Room to grow** — as my business scales, your hours and pay will too

- **A clear workflow** — all tasks in ONE shared doc, one weekly check-in, no chaos across 5 apps

- **Warm, purposeful brand** — you'll be helping real women change their lives



 HOW TO APPLY



Please send me a message with the following **in this exact order** (I will not read applications that skip this):



1. **Subject line:** `Maui Coach VA — [Your First Name]`

2. **A short intro:** 3–4 sentences about who you are and why this role speaks to you (no templates, please)

3. **Your CapCut experience:** How long have you used it? What kind of videos have you edited?

4. **2–3 portfolio links** of TikToks or Reels you've edited (yours or for a client)

5. **Your weekly availability:** How many hours, and what are your usual working hours in HST?

6. **Your hourly rate** in USD

7. **This phrase at the bottom of your message so I know you read the whole post:** `I read the whole thing — let's build.`



THE PROCESS



- **Step 1:** I review applications and shortlist my top 5

- **Step 2:** 20-minute Zoom interview with the shortlist

- **Step 3:** **Paid 1-week trial** ($25–50 for a small real project) — I will never ask you for free work

- **Step 4:** I offer the role to the person who made my life easier in the trial



 WHAT NOT TO DO



- Please don't send a copy-paste template

- Please don't skip the application questions above

- Please don't apply if you can't commit to at least 10 hours per week consistently



ABOUT ME



I'm a single mom based in Maui, building a coaching practice rooted in honesty, emotional intelligence, and real transformation. My content is faceless voiceover + occasional face-to-camera, warm and grounded in tone. I'm looking for a teammate who cares about doing great work and wants to grow with a brand that's just getting started.



Mahalo for reading all the way through. I'm excited to meet you.



— Caroline

title: Sales Admin & AI Operations Support
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW



Fintonia Group is seeking a Senior Sales Admin & AI Operations Support professional to serve as the operational backbone of its sales and client engagement functions. This is not a conventional administrative role: the individual will be responsible for maintaining rigorous sales operations while independently building and managing AI-powered workflows that enhance team productivity, client responsiveness, and process quality. A non-negotiable attribute for this role is an exceptional standard of accuracy — the work product this person owns directly reflects on the firm's credibility with clients and counterparties.



The successful candidate will bring a combination of structured administrative discipline and a strong command of modern AI automation tools. Reporting directly to the Head of Sales, this person will work across sales, compliance, and operations to ensure that client onboarding and engagement workflows operate to institutional standards.



At a firm that sits at the intersection of traditional finance and digital assets, the ability to translate operational complexity into streamlined, technology-enabled processes will be a direct contribution to commercial outcomes.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. AI Workflow Design & Maintenance

- Own the design, build, and ongoing maintenance of AI-assisted workflows across sales operations, client communications, and document management.

- Identify manual or repetitive processes and deploy automation solutions using tools such as n8n, Zapier, Make, or similar platforms integrated with LLMs.

- Maintain and iterate on prompt libraries, automated response flows, and AI-assisted drafting tools used by the sales team.

- Monitor AI workflow performance, troubleshoot failures, and implement improvements in response to operational feedback.



2. Sales Operations Support

- Manage CRM hygiene and data integrity, ensuring pipeline records, contact logs, and activity tracking remain current and accurate.

- Prepare regular sales reports and performance summaries for the Head of Sales, translating pipeline and activity data into clear, actionable insights.

- Support internal reporting requirements by compiling and structuring data from CRM and other operational systems.



3. Client Onboarding & Coordination

- Manage the preparation and tracking of client onboarding documentation, coordinating with compliance and operations to ensure timely completion.

- Act as a reliable point of contact for client queries, ensuring responses are substantive, accurate, and delivered within agreed timeframes.

- Organize and support client meetings, webinars, and product demonstrations, including logistics, materials, and follow-up coordination.



4. Process Improvement

- Proactively identify bottlenecks in sales and client service workflows and develop structured proposals for improvement.

- Document operational procedures and build internal knowledge bases that reduce dependency on tribal knowledge.



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE):

- 4+ years of experience in sales support, client operations, or administrative roles within financial services or a related regulated environment.

- Demonstrated hands-on experience building and maintaining AI-assisted workflows using tools such as n8n, Make, Zapier, or equivalent automation platforms.

- Working knowledge of LLM prompt design and practical application of AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) in a professional operations context.

- Proficiency in CRM systems (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot) with demonstrated experience maintaining data quality.

- Strong written and verbal communication skills in English; capable of producing client-grade documentation independently.

- Experience with client onboarding documentation or compliance-adjacent processes.

- Exceptional attention to detail — this role involves managing documentation, data, and client records where errors have direct business and reputational consequences. Candidates must demonstrate a track record of precision under workload pressure.

- Ability to work independently in a remote environment, exercise sound judgment, and escalate appropriately.



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS (NICE-TO-HAVE):

- Experience building internal tools or documentation systems (e.g., Notion, Confluence, Airtable).

- Background working in or with cross-functional teams spanning compliance, product, and sales.

- Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Finance, Information Systems, or a related discipline.



SUCCESS METRICS (FIRST 6–12 MONTHS):

- At least 3 recurring manual workflows have been replaced or materially accelerated through AI automation, with measurable time savings documented.

- Sales reports are delivered consistently on schedule, with the Head of Sales confirming they are actionable and replacing previously manual consolidation efforts.

- Client onboarding turnaround time meets or improves on established benchmarks, with zero compliance escalations attributed to documentation errors.

- CRM data integrity score (completeness and accuracy) meets the internal standard set by the sales lead.

- Sales team reports a meaningful reduction in administrative overhead, allowing more time to be allocated to client-facing activities.



ABOUT FINTONIA GROUP:

Fintonia Group is a technology-enabled digital assets financial services platform with offices in Singapore and Kuala Lumpur. The firm combines deep institutional finance expertise with a focused mandate to bring credible, regulated financial services infrastructure to the digital assets space.



The team is composed of professionals with backgrounds at leading global investment banks and financial institutions. Fintonia operates in a dynamic, high-accountability environment where individual contributions have direct business impact and where the expectation is ownership, not execution of instructions.



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Work Hours: Aligned with Singapore Time Zone (SGT), Monday to Friday



Please apply through this link - 
 . 

ONLY applicants who upload CV via the link will be considered. Thanks!

title: Remote Staff Accountant - Vacation Rental
description:
Maui Paradise Properties is a locally owned, full?service real estate and vacation rental company on Maui, specializing in managing premium homes and condos and providing high?touch service to owners and guests. We are seeking a **remote** Staff Accountant with vacation rental or property management experience to support our growing portfolio and accounting team.



Position overview



- Title: Staff Accountant – Vacation Rentals (Remote)  

- Schedule: Full?time, Monday–Friday (Hawaii business hours overlap required)  

- Location: Remote (preference for candidates with experience supporting US?based companies)  

- Reports to: Controller and Accounting Manager



The Staff Accountant is responsible for day?to?day accounting for vacation rental properties, including owner and property level activity, reconciliations, and monthly reporting.



Key responsibilities



- Record and reconcile daily financial transactions for multiple vacation rental properties, including rental income, fees, taxes, and operating expenses.  

- Process and code vendor invoices, credit card charges, and reimbursements; ensure accurate GL coding by property, unit, and department.  

- Perform monthly bank reconciliations and balance?sheet reconciliations (cash, deposits, prepaid, accruals, intercompany accounts).  

- Assist with owner accounting, including tracking owner statements, owner charges/credits, and preparation of owner reports and support schedules.  

- Support month?end close by preparing journal entries, accruals, and variance explanations for vacation rental operations.  

- Help maintain an orderly and complete digital filing system for invoices, reconciliations, and supporting documentation in line with internal controls.  

- Respond to internal questions from operations, reservations, and owner relations teams regarding accounting entries, balances, and reports.  

- Assist with preparation of schedules for external CPA, auditors, and tax filings as needed.  



Qualifications



- 2+ years of accounting experience, ideally in vacation rentals, hotels, property management, or hospitality.  

- Solid understanding of debits/credits, reconciliations, and month?end close processes.  

- Experience working with property?based or multi?entity accounting (tracking income and expenses by property/unit).  

- Proficiency with accounting software and spreadsheets (e.g., QuickBooks Online and Excel/Google Sheets).  

- Strong attention to detail, accuracy, and ability to follow documented processes in a remote environment.  

- Clear written and verbal communication skills in English and comfort working with a distributed team across time zones.  



Remote work expectations



- Reliable high?speed internet, computer, and quiet workspace suitable for accounting work and online meetings.  

- Consistent availability during agreed?upon hours overlapping with Hawaii time for collaboration, handoffs, and training.  

- Ability to work independently, manage priorities across multiple properties, and meet daily and monthly deadlines.



How to apply



Please reply to this ad and attach your resume.



Compensation:

-$6/hrs, $7/hrs after 3 months probation

-13th month pay

-2 weeks paid vacation after 1 year

-$100 per month medicare allowance

-3-5% COLA

title: Customer Support & Ecommerce Operations Assistant (Shopify / Full-Time / US Hours Overlap)
description:
Customer Support & Ecommerce Operations Assistant

Full-Time Remote Position



About Tradlands

We create essentials women’s clothing — like sweaters, dresses, t-shirts, jumpsuits, pants, and jackets — in small, responsibly made batches. Each new product, like our business, is developed slowly and thoughtfully, with respect for the people we work with and our customers.



We carefully engineer each detail — from the fit to the fabric to the trims — and refine your favorites every year. Timeless, well-made essentials that redefine the meaning of effortless style.



Clothing shouldn't be stressful. Getting dressed shouldn't cause anxiety. But every woman knows those feelings.

Our goal is to create clothing that honors our customers, gives them confidence, creates a canvas for their personal style, and allows them to move through their day with ease — so they can focus on the things that matter most to them.



About Our Team

Tradlands is a small remote team. We are focused on creating customer happiness through our products, as well as our interactions and conversations. We use this as a litmus test for all of our actions and resulting procedures.



Excellent communication is the key to clarity. We believe in systems and processes that are effective, efficient, and repeatable. Systems and processes provide a simple, direct path to completing tasks, projects, and our overall mission.



Our systems and processes are intended to be clear and precise enough they can be performed easily by a new tea
mber with minimal yet sufficient training.



About Our Customer Service

Tradlands is a customer-centric company and we understand customers are the reason we exist as a company and why we get to do what we love every day.



We go out of our way to satisfy and delight our customers and exceed their expectations whenever possible. In return we hope our customers go out of their way to spread the word about Tradlands.



Working with our company should always be easy. We help everybody who reaches out to us with a positive attitude and a helpful reply, no matter how big or small the request.



We use good judgment in all situations and aim to always do the right thing for our customers and our team.



About You

You are a customer-facing professional with a real interest in helping customers. While direct customer experience with a women’s DTC apparel brand is not required, you are someone who has worked in hospitality, retail, professional services, or any other role that involves direct communication with and the support of customers.



You are a natural problem solver. You can always depend on your creativity and resourcefulness to get the job done and nurture happy customers while doing it.



You have a roll-up-your-sleeves, get-it-done personality with a friendly and professional attitude.



You are detail-oriented and meticulous in your work.



You are comfortable managing your own workload while working remotely.



Hard Skills

Technically savvy. This role requires you to work across multiple software applications to support both customers and operations.



Experience with tools such as:

Shopify

Customer support inbox platforms (CommsLayer or similar)

Returns platforms such as WeSupply

Google Workspace

Spreadsheets and documentation tools



Clear, personable communication and excellent writing skills are essential since you will be responding directly to customers.



You are comfortable working with documentation and tracking information such as shipment logs, payment schedules, and internal operational documents.



Soft Skills

You have strong listening skills and emotional intelligence.



You remain calm and professional in difficult situations and can help turn a negative experience into a positive one.



You understand the importance of your role in supporting both customers and the broader operations of the company.



Nice To Have

Interest in women’s apparel and ability to help customers with sizing and product questions.



Experience working with ecommerce brands.



Experience supporting operational workflows such as supplier shipments or inventory coordination.



Specific Tasks

Build and maintain real, high-quality relationships with our customers.



Answer pre- and post-purchase customer inquiries efficiently and professionally through our inbox platform (Commslayer).



Process returns, exchanges, and order edits through Shopify and our returns platform (WeSupply).



Assist customers with sizing guidance, product information, and order questions.



Coordinate with our 3PL fulfillment partner to resolve order issues and shipment questions.



Assist with operational coordination tasks including tracking inbound supplier shipments and updating internal documentation as inventory moves from international suppliers to our U.S. warehouse.



Support supplier and vendor payment tracking by maintaining payment schedules, monitoring due dates, and assisting with preparing wire transfers when required.



Monitor and manage returns workflows inside our returns platform (WeSupply).



Maintain accurate internal documentation related to supplier shipments, payments, and operational workflows.



Attend tea
etings and communicate clearly with tea
mbers regarding customer issues and operational updates.



Bring new ideas and improvements to customer service and operational workflows.



Compose weekly or monthly summaries and KPI reports when requested.



Build and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for your areas of responsibility.



Become highly knowledgeable about our products and proactively help customers choose the right items.



A Typical Day Might Include

Answering customer
s through CommsLayer.



Processing returns and exchanges through WeSupply.



Editing or updating customer orders in Shopify.



Coordinating with our warehouse partner to resolve order issues.



Updating shipment tracking information for incoming supplier shipments.



Updating internal spreadsheets or documentation related to shipments or payments.



Communicating with the team about customer issues or operational updates.



Benefits

Full training will be provided so you can learn our systems, products, and processes.



All Philippine holidays are paid time off.



Employees receive 40 hours of paid time off (PTO) per year, with up to 5 unused hours allowed to roll over into the following year.



You will gain experience working with a small ecommerce team and modern ecommerce tools.



Remote Work

This role is full-time at 40 hours per week.



This is a fully remote contract position.



Candidates must be available Monday through Friday.



This role requires daily overlap with U.S. Eastern Time, typically 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM Eastern, in order to respond to customer inquiries and coordinate with the team.



This role is best suited for someone looking for a long-term full-time position with a stable schedule rather than short-term freelance work.



We rely heavily on collaborative tools including 
, Google Workspace, and Asana.



You will be responsible for furnishing your own computer.



You must have dependable high-speed internet access.



Application Instructions

Applications that do not follow this instruction may not be reviewed.



Apply here:

title: Video Editor Needed - Short-Form Content (TikTok/Instagram Reels)
description:
Video Editor Needed - Short-Form Content (TikTok/Instagram Reels)



Budget: $150/month (consistent, long-term work)



I run a crypto/finance content brand with 230K+ followers across platforms. I need a video editor who can recreate viral short-form videos (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts) for my accounts.



Here’s the exact workflow:

Research -  Do daily research for 10 viral videos to recreate, I will send you examples so you know exactly what to look for



Text Overlays - Watch the original video and copy the text overlays word for word. Write them down and place them into the recreated video with clean formatting and timing.



Sounds & Music - Find the original sound on TikTok and add it into CapCut. If you can’t find the sound, screen record the original video, import it into CapCut, and extract the audio from the screen recording. Over time you’ll build a library of sounds and this gets faster.



Editing & Delivery - Recreate the video using the clips I provide, the copied text, and the sound. Match the pacing, transitions, and energy of the original. Export in vertical format (9:16) optimized for TikTok/Reels/Shorts. Deliver consistently on schedule.



What I’m Looking For - Experience editing short-form vertical content (TikTok, Reels, Shorts). Comfortable using CapCut or similar editing software. Good eye for trending formats, text placement, and timing. Fast turnaround and reliable communication. Understanding crypto/finance content is a plus but not required.



How To Apply - Send me a
 message 
 with a short intro about yourself and your editing experience, and your 3 best edited videos (short-form, vertical format preferred).If your work is solid, we start immediately.



This is ongoing monthly work with room to grow as the brand scales.

description:
Coding & Robotics Education Licensee - Master Trainer







Remote-Based  |  Occasional Travel Required  |  Part-Time / Contract





About Our Company :



We are the leading Coding and Robotics Education Academy in Singapore. Our passion and mission is in teaching the children of today, the skills of tomorrow, and have fun learning it !



About the Role : 



We are seeking a passionate and experienced Coding & Robotics Education Trainer to support our growing network of licensees. The successful candidate will be responsible for training our licensee partners who have adopted our full coding and robotics curriculum, ensuring they are well-equipped to deliver high-quality STEM education programs.



This role is primarily remote-based, with occasional travel required for training sessions, workshops, or partner support.



You will empower our licensees with the knowledge, skills, and confidence to deliver our coding and robotics curriculum effectively to children aged 5 to 14 years old. You will also play a key role in keeping our curriculum fresh, relevant, and engaging by updating existing materials and developing new content as our programmes evolve.



Key Responsibilities :



•	Train and onboard new licensees on our full coding and robotics curriculum, ensuring they are equipped to deliver high-quality lessons.

•	Conduct training workshops and sessions for licensee educators, both virtually and in-person as required.

•	Provide ongoing coaching, mentoring, and support to licensees post-training.

•	Evaluate licensee competency and readiness to deliver the curriculum independently.

•	Review, update, and improve existing curriculum materials to ensure they remain current and effective.

•	Develop new curriculum modules and lesson plans aligned with industry trends and educational best practices.

•	Collaborate with the curriculum and product teams to align training delivery with programme goals.

•	Gather feedback from licensees and learners to continuously improve training programmes.

•	Maintain comprehensive training documentation, guides, and resources.

•	Travel occasionally to licensee locations for in-person training, support, and quality assurance.



Who We Are Looking For :



We are seeking someone who combines a love for education technology with real-world teaching experience. The ideal candidate:

•	Has proven experience training adults in a professional or educational setting.

•	Has hands-on experience teaching or working with children between the ages of 5 and 14 years old.

•	Holds a background in coding, robotics, STEM education, or a closely related field.

•	Is comfortable using and teaching tools such as Scratch, Python, block-based coding platforms, or robotics kits (e.g., LEGO Mindstorms, mBot, or similar).

•	Demonstrates strong curriculum development and instructional design skills.

•	Is an excellent communicator — able to simplify complex technical concepts for varied audiences.

•	Is self-driven, organised, and able to work independently in a remote environment.

•	Is flexible and willing to travel when required.



Qualifications & Experience :



•	Diploma or Degree in Education, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline.

•	Minimum 2 years of teaching or training experience — experience with both children and adults is strongly preferred.

•	Current or former school teachers specialising in Computing, ICT, STEM, or related subjects are warmly encouraged to apply.

•	Experience in curriculum writing, lesson planning, or instructional design is a strong advantage.

•	Experience in a franchising or licensee-based education business is a bonus, but not required.

•	Proficiency in digital tools for remote training delivery (e.g., Zoom, Google Meet, LMS platforms).



What We Offer :



•	Flexible, remote-based working arrangement.

•	A meaningful role shaping the next generation of coders and innovators.

•	A collaborative and supportive team environment.

•	Opportunities for professional development and growth within the organisation.

•	Travel allowances for required in-person training engagements.

•	Competitive remuneration commensurate with experience.

title: Corporate Sales Manager – Real Estate Solutions
description:
Job Position is BASED IN SINGAPORE




.sg



Full job description : 



Start Something Purposeful. 



At Urban Space Group , we believe in creating concepts that allow people, business and purpose to come together and thrive. We’re a privately owned real estate group dedicated to real estate concepts for industrial and commercial spaces. We are both owners of industrial properties, commercial shophouses and spaces, as well as operators of business models and concepts such as urbanspace self storage, Urbanpod workspace etc. 



We actively invest to expand our asset portfolio and grow our industrial and shophouse asset management capabilities and offerings.  



We’re looking for a Business Development and Sales Manager to bring our asset investment and management services to our clients, partners and stakeholders. 



Why Join Acuvest :



Your Mission :



To be part of the team to grow our asset portfolio and drive performance through innovations and teamwork. 



This is a full-stack business development and sales role with plenty of room to use your skillsets in sales, strategy, innovation and execution. You’ll lead a motivated team and collaborate closely with other departments. You will report to the Business Development / Sales Director and play a critical role in the company’s performance. 



Why Join us :



- Mentored by management of a company with decades of experience in investment management, property management, development, and self-storage solutions across Singapore and the region. We combine strategic insight with innovation, offering real opportunities to grow and make an impact across a diversified real estate portfolio.



- Build an Elite Network: Connect directly with a high-value network of Corporate and SME business leaders / decision-makers, building a powerful network for your long-term career success. 



- Thrive in a High-Growth Self-Storage Sector. Our self-storage business, Co-working business space, E-commerce fulfilment hubs, serve both individual and corporate clients with flexible space solutions in a fast-rising market. You’ll be at the forefront of lead generation, networking, and deal closing—driving measurable results in an expanding industry.



- Collaborative Culture. Real Career Progression. Work with experienced professionals across property and investment teams, gain exposure to full deal cycles, build strong client relationships, and accelerate your career in sales and business development at Acuvest.



Full job description : What you will be doing



Property Leasing : 



- Develop and implement leasing strategies and initiatives to maximize occupancy, rental income, and tenant satisfaction 



- Identify leasing opportunities and prospective tenants that align with the positioning and target market of each property, and develop relationships with tenants and prospective tenants. 



- Negotiate lease agreements, including terms and conditions, rental rates, lease incentives, and lease renewals, and ensure compliance with company policies and industry standards. 



- Collaborate with property management teams to conduct market research and analysis, assess competitive landscape, and identify trends and opportunities in the property market. 



- Develop and maintain leasing budgets, forecasts, and reports, and track leasing activity, occupancy rates, and financial performance against targets and benchmarks. 



- Manage tenant relations and communication, including addressing tenant inquiries, resolving disputes, and ensuring tenant compliance with lease terms and property rules and regulations. 



- Represent the company at industry events, trade shows, and networking opportunities to promote our properties and attract potential tenants and partners. 



Self storage and Co working space sales : 



- Work closely self storage sales team and management on drive the sales and occupancy of our self storage business. 

Enjoy interacting with customers, drive Sales, customer service and relationship management. 



- Actively manage customer enquiries through telephone,
 and messaging applications 



- Providing sales service & consultation to all potential customers 



- Working with Team to formulate marketing promotions and collateral 



- Building relationship with Co-working space, Self Storage and E-commence fulfilment centre customers. 





Requirements : Who we are looking for.



- Strong business acumen and a strategic mindset. Enterprenuerial mindset 



- An outgoing, optimistic personality with exceptional interpersonal skills. Strong networking and interpersonal skills. 



- The ability to communicate confidently and effectively at all levels. Excellent communication skills, with the ability to build relationships and influence stakeholders at all levels. 



- Minimum of 5 years of experience working experience. 



- Strong understanding of leasing principles, market dynamics, and negotiation strategies in the real estate industry. 



- Proven track record of successfully negotiating lease agreements, driving occupancy, and achieving leasing targets and goals. 



- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to analyze market data, evaluate leasing opportunities, and make data-driven decisions. 



- Results-oriented mindset with a focus on driving leasing outcomes and delivering exceptional customer service to tenants and partners. 



- Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment. 



- An eagerness to learn and grow through hard work and dedication

title: Sales Admin Support
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW



Fintonia Group is seeking a Senior Sales Admin & AI Operations Support professional to serve as the operational backbone of its sales and client engagement functions. This is not a conventional administrative role: the individual will be responsible for maintaining rigorous sales operations while independently building and managing AI-powered workflows that enhance team productivity, client responsiveness, and process quality. A non-negotiable attribute for this role is an exceptional standard of accuracy — the work product this person owns directly reflects on the firm's credibility with clients and counterparties.



The successful candidate will bring a combination of structured administrative discipline and a strong command of modern AI automation tools. Reporting directly to the Head of Sales, this person will work across sales, compliance, and operations to ensure that client onboarding and engagement workflows operate to institutional standards.



At a firm that sits at the intersection of traditional finance and digital assets, the ability to translate operational complexity into streamlined, technology-enabled processes will be a direct contribution to commercial outcomes.



Key Responsibilities:

Client Onboarding & Documentation

Own the full client onboarding lifecycle — from intake through KYC/AML documentation, compliance review, and account activation — ensuring every file is complete, accurate, and audit-ready before submission.

Prepare and coordinate all onboarding documentation including subscription agreements, client questionnaires, and regulatory forms, working closely with the compliance and operations teams to meet applicable standards.

Proactively track onboarding status for all active clients, following up on outstanding items and escalating blockers to avoid delays in the activation timeline.

Maintain a structured, version-controlled onboarding repository that can withstand internal or regulatory audit at any point.



Client Relationship Support

Serve as the first point of contact for client enquiries, providing timely, professional responses and managing expectations on resolution timelines.

Coordinate all client-facing logistics — meetings, product demonstrations, webinars, and review calls — ensuring preparation materials, agendas, and follow-up notes are managed without requiring senior tea
mbers to chase.

Maintain accurate, current client records in the CRM; flag data anomalies, contact changes, or missing information proactively rather than reactively.

Support the relationship management team in preparing client update materials, periodic reports, and tailored communications.



Sales & Administrative Support

Support the sales team with scheduling, calendar management, CRM maintenance, and preparation of pitch materials and proposals.

Maintain internal trackers and action logs for client interactions, onboarding milestones, and sales pipeline activity.

Identify and flag opportunities to streamline administrative workflows using available technology tools.



Requirements:

3–5 years of experience in client onboarding, client servicing, or relationship support within financial services, fintech, or asset management

Hands-on experience managing KYC/AML documentation and compliance-driven onboarding processes end-to-end — not just assisting

Strong proficiency in CRM systems (e.g. Salesforce, HubSpot) and Microsoft Office / Google Workspace

Excellent written English communication skills; able to draft professional client-facing correspondence independently and accurately

Structured, detail-oriented approach to documentation management with a track record of maintaining audit-ready files

Demonstrated ability to manage multiple concurrent client onboarding workflows without supervision

Comfortable working remotely and independently, aligned to Singapore / KL business hours (SGT/MYT)

Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, or a related field



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Work Hours: Aligned with Singapore Time Zone (SGT), Monday to Friday



Please apply through this link -

ONLY applicants who upload CV via the link will be considered. Thanks!

title: Virtual Assistants
description:
We are an e-commerce company based in California, USA. We've been in business for over ten years and have extensive experience in eCommerce. We're currently looking for a few high-energy, good communicators, punctual, able to follow instructions, analytical, and hard workers.



The ideal candidates must be fluent in English (both spoken and written) and have prior remote working experience. The candidates should be available to work 40 hours per week, have access to a fast and stable internet connection, and own a functioning web camera and microphone for daily video calls. title: LinkedIn Writer
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a sharp, creative LinkedIn Content Writer who can build a powerful personal or brand presence on LinkedIn, one that stops the scroll, earns trust, and drives real engagement. This isn't a copy-paste content mill role. You'll be crafting 5 high-quality posts per week that combine authoritative writing with visually compelling, data-driven infographics and model-style graphic design.



What You'll Do

You'll write and publish 5 LinkedIn posts daily, each crafted to educate, provoke thought, or inspire action within a specific niche. Every post must feel like it came from a credible expert, not a content scheduler. Alongside your writing, you'll design or direct infographics, carousel frameworks, and model-style visual breakdowns. Think clean hierarchy, bold typography, and data visualization that makes complex ideas instantly digestible.



You'll research trending topics and industry conversations to stay ahead of the curve, develop a consistent voice and editorial calendar, A/B test hooks and formats, and analyze post performance to continuously refine the content strategy.



What We're Looking For

You have at least 2 years of experience writing professional content for LinkedIn, with a portfolio that proves you can drive engagement, not just impressions. You understand what makes a LinkedIn hook work in the first three lines, and you know how to structure a post for maximum dwell time and comments.



On the design side, you're comfortable in Canva, Figma, or Adobe Express and can produce infographics that look like they belong on a top-tier thought leader's feed. You have a strong eye for layout, color, and information hierarchy. Bonus points if you've grown a LinkedIn account from scratch or ghostwritten for executives or founders.



Non-Negotiables

Consistency is everything here: 5 posts per week, every week, on schedule. Each piece of content must be original, well-researched, and free of generic filler. You take ownership of results and aren't waiting to be managed.



Compensation

Competitive, based on experience. Performance bonuses tied to engagement growth and follower milestones.

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM Specialist
description:
We are a real estate agency looking for a hands-on GHL CRM Specialist to own our lead conversion system end-to-end. You will build, manage, and optimise our GoHighLevel setup to ensure every lead, from
, and Google, is captured, nurtured, and converted efficiently. You will work closely with our agents to make sure they spend time closing deals, not chasing leads manually.



Key Responsibilities

CRM & Pipeline Management

Build and maintain GHL pipelines that reflect the property transaction lifecycle (inquiry ? viewing ? OTP ? close)

Segment and tag leads by intent, timeline, citizenship status, and property type

Ensure clean, accurate contact data across all lead sources



Workflow & Automation

Design and deploy automated nurture sequences via WhatsApp, SMS, and

Configure behaviour-based triggers (link clicks, page visits, form submissions) to personalise follow-up timing

Build lead scoring logic to prioritise hot leads for agents

Set up appointment reminder workflows and post-viewing follow-up sequences



Lead Source Integration

Connect and maintain integrations with PropertyGuru, 99.co,
 Lead Ads, Google Ads, and other portals via Zapier or webhooks

Ensure zero lead leakage across all channels



Agent Enablement

Train agents on how to use GHL's mobile app, conversations inbox, and task management

Create WhatsApp and SMS message templates that are value-driven and PDPA-compliant

Build dashboards so agents can track their pipeline at a glance



Reporting & Optimisation

Monitor key metrics: speed-to-first-contact, lead-to-viewing rate, viewing-to-OTP rate, and campaign ROI

Run A/B tests on message templates, timing, and sequences

Provide weekly performance reports to management





Requirements

Minimum 2 years of hands-on GoHighLevel experience (mandatory)

Strong understanding of marketing automation, CRM best practices, and funnel design

Familiarity with real estate market 

Experience integrating lead sources via Zapier, Make, or direct webhooks

Working knowledge of WhatsApp Business API setup and compliance

Understanding of Singapore's PDPA requirements for marketing communications

Proficient in crafting messaging that is consultative, not pushy



Nice to Have

Experience with
/Google Ads campaign management

Basic HTML/CSS for
 template customisation

Prior work with property agencies in Singapore



What Success Looks Like in 90 Days

All lead sources connected and flowing into GHL with zero manual data entry

Automated nurture sequences live for Hot, Warm, and Cold lead segments

Agents respond to every new lead within 5 minutes via automated WhatsApp

A live dashboard tracking pipeline velocity and conversion rates by agent
